programme.title: Lenmakana Jellyfish Lake, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Lenmakana Jellyfish Lake is located onthe east part of Misool Island. Only have been discovered a few years ago, this lake is best visiting at noon when the waters are glowing with thousands of golden jellyfish. The temperature of the water is also warm, making it a comfortable time to go for a dip. These jellyfish are fragile, so as long as you treat these creatures gently and respect their home, you can swim with them wholeheartedly. Explore the lake with your new found companions!

programme.title: Dive Site Tatawa Besar, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: In this episode, we will explore Tatawa Besar dive site, located in the Komodo National Park in Indonesia and learn about its incredible marine life. Discover the unique behaviors of species like the Titan Triggerfish and Leopard Flounder. Explore the vibrant coral ecosystems, understand coral reproduction methods, and witness the vital role of sponges in the marine environment. Delve into the colorful world of fish species such as the Crescent-tail Bigeye and neon fusiliers. You'll also have the chance to observe the stunning shallow coral garden or seek out fascinating macro critters like the ribbon eel.

programme.title: Dive Site Siaba Besar, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Siaba Besar dive site is located in the Central part of the Komodo National Park. Siaba Besar dive site is a sheltered bay with coral seamounts and amazing coral reefs, located in the North-West side of the island. The reef is 4-6 meters deep with healthy corals and sand patches around. It has a massive coral garden and lacks strong currents, but it does not mean it lacks cool sights and marine life, just the opposite! This feature makes Siaba Besar a suitable dive site for any kind of level, being the best place for those who have never dived and want to try this amazing experience in Komodo National Park. Siaba Besar is heaven for snorkelers, given its easy conditions with shallow coral reefs, very little current and abundant marine life. A superlative snorkeling among sea turtles it is guaranteed, which gives the nickname to this site: Turtle City

programme.title: Dive Site Tatawa Kecil, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Tatawa Kecil is located in the north-east part of Komodo Island. Tatawa Kecil is known for having strong current, as it is in the middle of the Linta strait, the strait between Komodo Island and Rinca Island. Tatawa Kecil is offering intriguing rock formations, caves, swim throughs, boulders, drop offs, and a massive field with huge and vibrant coral gardens. The topography of the site differs greatly from other ones, it is one of the most fascinating and unique in the park. It has almost anything a diver can hope to see, both big and small, an enjoyable dive is guaranteed.

programme.title: Dive Site Manta Point, Nusa Penida, Indonesia
programme.desc: In this episode, you will explore Manta Point, located in Nusa Penida, Bali, Indonesia, and learn about its remarkable marine inhabitants. Manta Point, situated on Nusa Penida's southwest coast, is renowned for its resident Manta ray colony, making it a must-visit dive site. Divers of all levels are drawn to its diverse range of underwater experiences, including reef exploration, photography, training, and fish identification. Notable species found here include the day octopus and the tawny nurse shark, both captivating creatures. Manta rays, particularly the Manta alfredi species, gracefully glide through the water with their distinctive pectoral fins and are often seen at cleaning stations, where cleaner fish help them rid parasites. However, these majestic creatures face threats from overfishing and human impacts. Manta Point offers an extraordinary underwater adventure, showcasing the beauty and diversity of marine life in this region.

programme.title: The Komodo dragons of south Rinca, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Horseshoe Bay is located in the south of Rinca island, it is formed by Rinca island in the north and Nusa Kode in the south. The area is well known to be one of the best place to see wild Komodo dragons. The Komodo dragon (Varanus komodoensis), also known as the Komodo monitor, is a member of the monitor lizard family Varanidae that is endemic to the Indonesian islands of Komodo, Rinca, Flores, and Gili Motang. It is the largest extant species of lizard, growing to a maximum length of 3 metres, and weighing up to approximately 70 kilograms. As a result of their size, Komodo dragons are apex predators, and dominate the ecosystems in which they live. Komodo dragons hunt and ambush prey including invertebrates, birds, and mammals. It has been claimed that they have a venomous bite; there are two glands in the lower jaw that secrete several toxic proteins. The biological significance of these proteins is disputed, but the glands have been shown to secrete an anticoagulant. Komodo dragons' group behavior in hunting is exceptional in the reptile world. The diet of Komodo dragons mainly consists of Javan rusa (Rusa timorensis), though they also eat considerable amounts of carrion. Komodo dragons also occasionally attack humans.

programme.title: Lawa Darat island, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Lawa Darat island is located in the northern part of the Komodo National Park. Also known as the “island close to the land” has a barren, desert savannah that changes color from green to yellow depending on the season. The island features easy hiking trails and two viewpoints to suit both spectacular sunrise and sunsets. Lawa Darat island is well protected from strong winds and waves, making the island the perfect spot for various activities to be carried out in safety. Some even refer to the island as the Komodo’s fjord, as attributed to its geological position. Besides, Lawa Darat island’s proximity to the ocean crossroads enables visitors to experience unexpected marine surprises such as encountering the humpback or the blue whale emerging majestically from the sea. The main attraction of Lawa Darat island is the scenic view that awaits visitors as they trek and reach the peak. This sole reason is what drives most Komodo National Park visitors to land on this island. Although beautiful all day long, the best recommended time to trek to the peak is sunset, when the breathtaking panoramic view calls for an Instagram selfie. The vantage point makes it perfect for capturing the beautiful beaches or the rolling hills catching rays of light. Trekking to the peak of the island might be considered as quite challenging for some, in particular, the beginners, but it is incredibly doable and worthwhile. The view is better and more beautiful as you trek higher where the reef becomes clearer while the mountainside begins to glow. Be ready for the remarkable panorama that awaits you at the top where the Komodo National Park lies in the opposite.

programme.title: Horseshoe Bay, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Horseshoe Bay is located in the south of Rinca island, it is formed by Rinca island in the north and Nusa Kode in the south. The area of Rinca island south is undeveloped compared to Komodo island. It is dry and hot, the dense forest will give way to savannah grass. The area is well known to have many Komodo dragons as well as wild pigs, buffalos, deers, monkeys and many bird species.

programme.title: Dive Site Manta Alley, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Manta Alley dive site is located at the far southern end of Komodo Island in the Indian Ocean. Manta Alley consists of a series of small rocky islands a few hundred meters away from the main island. There are several spots around these rocks where mantas can be found almost all year round. The site starts in a shallow reef close to the shore, where you can expect a strong to mild drift dive. You should keep your eyes wide open just as you enter the water, as mantas can be often found right in the shallows. Manta Rays are coming to this area for mating and cleaning purposes, where small wrasse and butterfly fish clean the mantas of parasites. The cleaning station is around 20 meters, where the rocks meet a white sandy bottom, perfect spot to watch mantas gliding into the rocks. Though mantas are the main attraction of this site, Manta Alley it is also full of marine life including reef sharks, schools of trevallies and large wrasses. The corals are very beautiful and diverse as well, making this spot a spectacular background for marine life photography.

programme.title: Dive Site Cenote Maravilla, Puerto Morelos, Mexico
programme.desc: Cenote Maravilla is located 10 kilometers west of Puerto Morelos. The cenote is a sinkhole in the shape of a bell, where the entrance is a hole in the middle of the top. The thick sulfur cloud offers views that look from another planet. Getting close to this cloud is necessary to observe the gorgeous living stalactites, the biothems often called “Hell’s bells.” Those mysterious rock formations are alive and grow underwater thanks to extraordinary endemic bacteria. This type of speleothems, called “elephant feet,” has been found in only 4 cenotes, all in the Puerto Morelos area and are subject to ongoing scientific research.

programme.title: Dive Site Boo West, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Boo West dive site is located on the most western tip of the Boo island chain. There are rows of sea fans, large and small. The palette of the coral reefs ranges from yellow to pink to purple. A school of silver slides can show off as they moved rapidly as a pack.

programme.title: Dive Site Siaba Kecil, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Siaba Kecil dive site is located in the Central part of the Komodo National Park. The best time to dive this site is when the current is running! This is a real rollercoaster of a ride and will often be referred to as the 'Superman drift'. This gorgeous coral reef with a stunning overhang has a fast moving current - nothing scary just a great drift along. No need to kick! Towards the end of the dive site you drift towards and more sheltered area and the current eases off. Here you can relax (catch your breath!), and admire the stunning hard corals and thousands on anthias. This is also a great spot for seeing hawksbill turtles. The strong currents of this dive site attract large fish including giant trevally, barracuda, tuna, sharks and the odd ray too! The overhangs provide a fascinating topography and if the current allows they are great to explore and hunt for nurse sharks, bamboo sharks and other bizarre creatures.

programme.title: Batu Bolong north, Komodo, Indonesia
programme.desc: You are about to go on a fascinating journey through the amazing underwater world of Batu Bolong. As you watch this remarkable documentary, you will discover the wonderful beauty and diversity of life below the waves. Located within Indonesia's Komodo National Park, Batu Bolong's exposed rock pinnacle reveals a hidden paradise full of marine wonders. Despite challenges like changing currents and depths, you will learn how expert divers navigate the currents and explore different depths, from shallow coral gardens to tall walls. You will see the vibrant underwater dance of reef fish, including colorful groupers, moray eels, and majestic emperor fish. You will encounter the mysterious white tip reef shark, marvel at its unique anatomy, and understand its interesting behaviors. As the documentary reveals the top predator, the giant trevally, you will be captivated by its striking features and hunting skills. You will delve into the complex relationships within the ecosystem, from cleaner fish caring for their companions to the vital role of table corals in sheltering marine life. Immerse yourself in this kaleidoscope of colors, shapes, and behaviors, and let the enchanting beauty of Batu Bolong's underwater world leave you longing for more, ready to return to this aquatic oasis time and again.

programme.title: Dive Site Cenote Angelita, Tulum, Mexico
programme.desc: Cenote Angelita is located 10 kilometers west of Tulum. Angelita is a magical cenote that is often described as mysterious and a bit spooky. At first, the cenote appears to be unassuming, just a small pond in the middle of a very thick jungle. However, the deepest parts of the cenote go down to 204 ft (66 m). Its most amazing feature is a 4.5 ft (1.5 m) thick hydrogen sulfide cloud that starts at 83 ft (27 m). This cloud is made up of gases that have leaked out of decomposing trees and leaves that fall from the jungle into the cenote. This gas accumulates where the fresh and the salt water meet (the halocline). This creates a false floor at the bottom, which can be traversed to reach a dark, otherworldly chamber that is full of jungle detritus. The base of this mountain of detritus starts below but reaches above the cloud. Rising again from below the cloud, the peak of the mountain of detritus takes on a new face, as if one is ascending a cloud-topped mountain. On the way out of the cenote, there is a small cave loop, and at the surface, one can get an appreciation for all of the trees that provide this cenote with its hydrogen sulfide cloud.

programme.title: Dive Site Tormentos, Cozumel, Mexico (Part 1)
programme.desc: Tormentos dive site is located near Mia beach in the west of Cozumel. Tormentos Reef is located off the coast of Cozumel and houses a rich variety of marine life. Here you can find purple and orange coral structures, tunnels hiding nurse sharks and sea turtles, and huge rays nestled in the sand.

programme.title: Dive Site Paradise Reef, Cozumel, Mexico
programme.desc: Paradise Reef dive site is located in the west of Cozumel. Paradise Reef is the first reef when entering the Marine Park. The current runs from south to north normally. You will start across from the entrance to the Caleta and drift north. There are 2-3 coral ridges that parallel the shoreline. You can see schools of Grunts, Snappers, and Sergeant Majors, many Queen Angelfish. There are nice coral heads ranging from 3-6m tall that jut out from a sandy bottom. You can find anemones, and an assortment of nice sponges clinging to the coral heads. Just about every kind of fish from the area can be found here. Some of the bigger animals include barracuda and grouper. Keep a close eye for the small denizens such as Spotted Drum, Smooth Trunkfish, Spotted Moray Eels, and Spiny Lobster.

programme.title: Lawalaut Island, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Lawalaut Island is located northeast of Gili Lawa Darat Island. Gili Lawa Laut is understandably a magnet for visitors on land and sea. The island is in the Lesser Sunda Islands and sits to the north of Komodo Island and the other small islet of Gili Lawa Daret and as such is protected as part of the Komodo National Park. Geologically the islets are volcanic like much of the region and they have beautiful hills popular with hikers who come for the stunning views and secluded beaches. The island is uninhabited but has numerous trails for walking up the hills to see the surrounding area. The wildlife above water is slightly less of a draw than the sea life on this island as there is less vegetation than in other areas. The hills are grassy though, and the landscape is very beautiful and a popular photography spot for visitors to the national park.

programme.title: Arborek Island, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Arborek is a tiny island in Raja Ampat archipelago, on west Papua. It is easily walkable on foot, taking roughly thirty minutes to walk the entire coastline. The island is known for its very hospitable tourism village and exceptional handicrafts with a thriving souvenir community. Be ready to be greeted with open arms by everyone, with many children who are eager to be photographed. This authentic island welcomes guests with pride, the islanders are happy to introduce all to the Papuan culture and unique traditional foods. It is a perfect paradise to learn a bit of the Asai culture, which is still kept alive in this isolated place. Arborek island, traditionally a mooring spot for boatmen, is surrounded by splendid sago palms, nourished by fish and it is sparsely populated by a tiny population of around 200 residents, spread in around 40 families. The water is crystal clear, with white fine sand and many coconut trees and bushes, providing a quite comforting and refreshing atmosphere. At the wooden pier you will find some gazebos, ideal for relaxing.

What Is His Reason And What Is The Connection Between This Man And The Historical High Priest OKOMFO ANOKYE?*

programme.title: Dive Site Yucab, Cozumel, Mexico
programme.desc: Yucab dive site is located in front of Mia beach in the west of Cozumel. There is a huge concentration of marine life which covers this reef. There are sponges everywhere and of every color. The sand scoured overhangs offer refuge for lobsters, banded coral shrimps and the arrow crab. There are also large numbers of squirrelfish, angel and butterflyfish always swimming in pairs. This is a great site for photographers.

programme.title: Dive Site Paso Del Cedral, Cozumel, Mexico
programme.desc: Paso Del Cedral dive site is located in front of El Cedral in the south west of Cozumel. Also called Cedral Wall it is one of the most beautiful dive sites in Cozumel. It can be done as a wall dive or closer to shore over the reef. The part of the reef that is not a wall, consists of a mile of sloping hills covered in sponges and coral. The reef bottoms out at about 18 meters (60 feet). As for the current, it's generally moderate to strong. As you drift you'll get to see eagle rays, lobsters, hawksbill turtles, green morays, big pufferfish, toadfish, and even sharks.

programme.desc: A beautiful woman with an ulterior motive hires two gunslingers to escort her through Indian territory so she can be reunited with her awaiting husband.

programme.title: Dive Site Tank Rock, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Tank Rock dive site is located on the eastern tip of the Fiabacet Islands. The main feature of Tank Rock is the pinnacles off the east end of the rock, which are covered with colorful invertebrates and schools of fish. The north side of the ridge contains bommies, which are more colorful than those on the south.

programme.title: Dive Site Citrus Ridge, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Citrus Ridge dive site is located in the channel between Yanggefo and Gam Islands. A reef slope covered with mostly orange and purple soft corals. One of north Raja’s most colorful reefs. Deeper channel (Gam) side of reef usually has good schooling fish action. This reef has it all, reef fish, schooling pelagics, colorful bommies, wobbegong sharks, turtles, macro life. An outstanding dive!

programme.title: Dive Site Cape Kri, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Cape Kri is a dive site located on the northeast side of Kri Island. The site features a reef with a sloping wall. It is known around Raja Ampat area to have widest range of marine life occupying it. There are always huge schools of fish passing by. At the base of the reef, at 38 m/124ft, an ancient snagged anchor can be found.

programme.desc: Diving in Playa del Carmen at Sabalos Reef. Sabalos means “tarpon” and in the late summer months you can see large schools of these beautiful animals.

programme.title: Dive Site San Clemente, Cozumel, Mexico
programme.desc: San Clemente dive site is located in the south west of Cozumel. San Clemente Reef is a beginner diver's dream, with shallow depth between 10 meters and 15 meters and little current. As it is located between the Yucab Reef and the Tormentos Reef, San Clemente shares plenty of similarities with these two dive sites. Divers can encounter here spotted moray eels, butterflyfish swimming in pairs, groupers, snappers, grunts, scorpionfish, angelfish, seahorses hidden in the grass, damselfish, cowfish, eagle rays, filefish, barracudas. This dive spot has a mostly sandy bottom with coral outcrops and patches.

programme.title: Dive Site Blue Magic, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Blue Magic dive site is situated between the island of Kri and the main island of Waisai, in the Dampier Strait. It is a pinnacle reef out in the open ocean with the reef starting at around 8 meters from the surface and descends down to a depth of approximately 30 meters. Almost everything can be seen from mantas, sharks and tuna to massive schools of jacks and barracuda. Along the slopes and onto the reef top are a variety of fans, sponges and soft and hard corals.

programme.title: Manta Sandy Underwater Reef, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Manta Sandy is a reef located between Airborek Island and Mansuar Island.

programme.title: Wayil Islands, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: Wayil Islands are located northwest of Wayibatan Island. The wild labyrinth of lagoons among the craggy islets of Wayil in Misool is the definition of tranquillity. Also known as Wayil Batan islands, witness plenty of deserted beaches with spectacular scenery. Wayil Batan islands come from karst that was broken off from larger islands nearby.

programme.title: Dive Site Cenote Zapote, Puerto Morelos, Mexico
programme.desc: Cenote Zapote is located 20 kilometers west of Puerto Morelos. Cenote Zapote is named after the Sapote trees growing nearby. It is located on the “Ruta de los Cenotes” the old road from Puerto Morelos to Valladolid. Zapote has quite a deep drop from the land surface to the water surface of 6m/20ft but its access is easy via stairs. The walls will rise above you like a fortress and once you start your descent they become narrower until a depth of 20m/66ft before starting to open back up again. Once you reach a depth of 30m/100ft you will be above the talus cone in a bell shaped chamber with a narrow skylight in the top through which you just descended. Halocline and a thin misty layer of Hydrogen Sulfide floating on top of it, as well as some of the most amazing and incredible formations commonly described as bells, elephant feet, shower heads or trumpets will truly take your breath away with their strange beauty and impressive size.

programme.title: Dive Site Saporkren at Night, Raja Ampat, Indonesia
programme.desc: The village of Saporken is located on the island of Waigeo, close to the capital town of Waisai. This site is typically dived at night, however day diving is good too. Saporkren is your typical sandy bottom muck dive site, which is a little grubby since its just off of the village jetty. Making your way down a gentle slope (with little or no current) past a few coral bommies, the best bit of Saporkren is generally around 12-20 metres. We found full-size seahorses, cute bobtail squid, flying flatworms, clownfish anemones, colemani shrimp plus many unusual crabs species such as the boxer, xeno and porcelain.

programme.title: Padar island, Komodo National Park, Indonesia
programme.desc: Padar island is located in the middle of the straight between Rinca and Komodo Island. Padar is the third largest island in the Komodo National Park. It is located in the south central of the park, between Komodo and Rinca Island. In the past, Padar was one of the island in Komodo where there were dragons live. Along with the illegal hunting activities by human being, they are slowly disappeared and almost unable to see them anymore. The cause is simply because of the lack of foods, like deer and wild boar. Their extinction can be because they just died alone without any food to eat or prolonged hunger or they can be migrated to nearest island, Rinca. The island now remains empty with no dragons. However, other wild animals such as wild boars are still around daily. Today, Padar has become one of the most popular place to visit in Indonesia. It offers super magnificent view from the top of the island with pink sandy beach on the west side and white sandy beach on the east side. Formation of towering hill, just like Jurassic park. Although the island has no dragons existed, the island is one of the best charming spot of trekking. Those who love photographic, this is perhaps the best place for spectacular photos.

programme.title: Dive Site C56 Shipwreck, Puerto Morelos, Mexico
programme.desc: C-56 Shipwreck dive site is located in Puerto Morelos. The C-56 shipwreck served in World War II and it was sold to the Mexican Marine in 1966. The time pass by and later on 28th Oct 2000 was purposefully sunk, as a new attraction for divers coming to the Riviera Maya. Laying perfectly upright, with the keel on the sand at 90ft, the 184ft long Mexican Gun Boat was quickly inhabited by various marine life. The deck, at 64ft, is teeming with life and it's common to see a large shoal of Big Eye Travellies hunting there. As we travel around the wreck we commonly see large Wrasse, Groupers, Morays and, looking up, flights of Eagle Rays. Soft corals have colonized the wreck and now offer a home to many Arrow crabs and Fire worms amongst other small crustaceans and invertebrates.

programme.title: Spook Town
programme.desc: Dry Gulch Trading Post owner Kurt Fabian advances money on mortgages to the local settlers to finance an irrigation program. Three Texas Rangers, Tex Wyatt, Jim Steele and Panhandle Perkins transport the money in a strong box which they place in the Wells Fargo safe as agent Sam Benson assures them that he is the only one who knows the safe combination. Fabian conspires with Bill Gunner, Breed Crocker and Trigger Booth to steal the money and they fail, but Fabian gets it on his own. Benson is arrested, and a committee of citizens, led by Oscar Perrin accuse Captain Wyatt and the Rangers of carelessness and request the resignation of the Captain if the money is not recovered. Fabian owns the abandoned ghost town of "Mystic", and Gunner, Crocker and Booth take him there to force him to tell where he has hidden the money, They shoot at his feet to intimidate him and he dies from fright and shock. Tex, Jim and Panhandle are also searching the town and they find Fabian's body. Benson tells Lucy Warren that the money may be hidden in the old Wells Fargo office in Mystic and they go there and find the strongbox. Enter Gunner, Crocker and Booth. Enter the Rangers. Gunfight.

programme.title: Ending Real Fur
programme.desc: Jewelry magnate Taimoor Choudhry’s journey from luxury consumer to anti-fur activist begins with a shocking discovery: his fur trim came from a dog. This revelation sparks a life-changing mission that takes him undercover into the fur trade, supported by fashion icon Tim Gunn, rock star Alissa White-Gluz, and top activists. Ending Real Fur is a gripping, multiple award-winning documentary aiming to #MakeFurFarmsHistory and protect millions of animals worldwide.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: Shifting Gears is the all-new authoritative guide to the latest trends and technology from within today’s ever-changing automotive industry. From the racetrack to the suburban street, Shifting Gears delivers the most up-to-date news on cutting edge research, development and design. We delve beneath the skin of some of the most advanced machines on the planet – we visit international motor shows for the newest releases and concept vehicles; uncover new advances in technology developed both in the laboratory and on the race track; keep up to date in the race for alternative fuels, improved safety, satellite navigation, in-car entertainment and multi-media connectivity; and look ahead to the designs and trends of the future. From luxury dream machines and fantasy prototypes to the globally marketed mainstays, our access to the world’s leading race teams and automotive manufacturers ensure we have every corner covered. Enjoy the ride, as the future unfolds and we keep on shifting gears!

programme.title: Dzhumaya Mosque & Plovdiv
programme.desc: Dzhumaya Mosque is the main Muslim shrine in Plovdiv. It was built in 1363–1364 on the site of the Sveta Petka Tarnovska Cathedral Church after the conquest of Plovdiv by the Ottoman army. The Dzhumaya Mosque is one of the oldest cult Ottoman buildings of the Balkans. Today Dzhumaya Mosque is an active Muslim temple and is visited not only on religious holidays, but also during the week by the Muslim religious community in Plovdiv...[

programme.title: Khan Palace
programme.desc: We show you one of the best heritage of cultural tourism, as known The Khan's Palace. In the Crimean heartland, the longest-lived of the Turkic khanates left an even more enduring landmark, The Khan's Palace; in other words, home to the Crimean Tatars. Raised in the 16th century, Khan’s Palace served as a palace for the representatives of the Giray dynasty. Located in the city of Bakhchisaray, the palace was the political, spiritual, and cultural epicenter of the Crimean Tatars. Above all, n the the Palace has the limestone mountains, pristine forest slopes, and orchards.Khan's Palace is a complex containing majestic mosques, menacing courtrooms, a hidden harem, a fountain of tears, and sorrowful tombs. The earliest dated construction in this ensemble bears the date of 1532, while the written records mention the Palace under 1539.The Palace stretches more than 50000 square meters and consists of 17 buildings and 9 courtyards. So,the overall architectural ambiance of the Palace is a careful amalgam of Middle Eastern and Crimean Tatar tradition. Moreover gardens and a life-giving, sustaining, and purifying supply of water is the focal point of the Palace’s design. The Big Khan Mosque is one of the oldest structures in the Palace, dating back to 1532, in short of the best heritage of cultural tourism. The Mosque is one of the largest in Crimea and bears the name of Sahib I Giray as its commissioner. The entry into the mosque is from a portal facing north. In addition, the mosque is made by Ottoman-designed. The roof, a narthex, and porticos are covering the main prayer hall. From the porticos, rise two minarets to the height of 28 meters.The minarets are octagonal and adorned with conical tops and finials. The lead and glass are decorating the minarets with imitation stones. The walls of the Mosque contain murals; depicting Quranic inscriptions and Islamic symbology. The calligraphic adeptness of these murals is phenomenal and bears a proud testimony to the skills of Persian artists. To sum up, the murals appear in green cartouches on the main façade of the Mosque and add to the charm of wood and plasterwork.

They discuss various cigars from the lists, including the Davidoff Grand Cru Diademas Finas, Aganorsa Anniversario Maduro, Crowned Heads Los Calaveras, My Father No. 4, Plasencia Alma Fuerte Colorado Claro, and Quesada 50th Anniversary Toro, offering their unfiltered opinions and experiences with each. The episode culminates in the reveal of their blind-smoked cigar as the Dunbarton Tobacco and Trust Red Meat Lovers (a 6x60 box-pressed porterhouse), and a lively debate about the merits of "boutique" versus well-known brands on such lists, emphasizing that personal preference in cigars means "there's no right and wrong"

programme.title: Khan Palace
programme.desc: We show you one of the best heritage of cultural tourism, as known The Khan's Palace. In the Crimean heartland, the longest-lived of the Turkic khanates left an even more enduring landmark, The Khan's Palace; in other words, home to the Crimean Tatars. Raised in the 16th century, Khan’s Palace served as a palace for the representatives of the Giray dynasty. Located in the city of Bakhchisaray, the palace was the political, spiritual, and cultural epicenter of the Crimean Tatars. Above all, n the the Palace has the limestone mountains, pristine forest slopes, and orchards.Khan's Palace is a complex containing majestic mosques, menacing courtrooms, a hidden harem, a fountain of tears, and sorrowful tombs. The earliest dated construction in this ensemble bears the date of 1532, while the written records mention the Palace under 1539.The Palace stretches more than 50000 square meters and consists of 17 buildings and 9 courtyards. So,the overall architectural ambiance of the Palace is a careful amalgam of Middle Eastern and Crimean Tatar tradition. Moreover gardens and a life-giving, sustaining, and purifying supply of water is the focal point of the Palace’s design. The Big Khan Mosque is one of the oldest structures in the Palace, dating back to 1532, in short of the best heritage of cultural tourism. The Mosque is one of the largest in Crimea and bears the name of Sahib I Giray as its commissioner. The entry into the mosque is from a portal facing north. In addition, the mosque is made by Ottoman-designed. The roof, a narthex, and porticos are covering the main prayer hall. From the porticos, rise two minarets to the height of 28 meters.The minarets are octagonal and adorned with conical tops and finials. The lead and glass are decorating the minarets with imitation stones. The walls of the Mosque contain murals; depicting Quranic inscriptions and Islamic symbology. The calligraphic adeptness of these murals is phenomenal and bears a proud testimony to the skills of Persian artists. To sum up, the murals appear in green cartouches on the main façade of the Mosque and add to the charm of wood and plasterwork.

programme.title: How Not to Die
programme.desc: How Not to Die is a bold feature documentary that confronts the greatest threat to human health—our diet. Based on the international bestselling book of the same name, by Dr. Michael Greger, this movie plays like a fast-paced action thriller but is packed with hard-hitting data that just might save your life. How Not to Die exposes the role of the standard Western diet in fueling today’s most widespread illnesses. The film offers jaw-dropping, but evidence-based, insights into the prevention of heart disease, type 2 diabetes, obesity, kidney disease, liver dysfunction, and a spectrum of brain disorders, including dementia and Alzheimer’s disease. It also addresses how diet influences the development of colon, prostate, and other digestive cancers, delivering life-saving information with clarity and authority.

programme.title: Khan Palace
programme.desc: We show you one of the best heritage of cultural tourism, as known The Khan's Palace. In the Crimean heartland, the longest-lived of the Turkic khanates left an even more enduring landmark, The Khan's Palace; in other words, home to the Crimean Tatars. Raised in the 16th century, Khan’s Palace served as a palace for the representatives of the Giray dynasty. Located in the city of Bakhchisaray, the palace was the political, spiritual, and cultural epicenter of the Crimean Tatars. Above all, n the the Palace has the limestone mountains, pristine forest slopes, and orchards.Khan's Palace is a complex containing majestic mosques, menacing courtrooms, a hidden harem, a fountain of tears, and sorrowful tombs. The earliest dated construction in this ensemble bears the date of 1532, while the written records mention the Palace under 1539.The Palace stretches more than 50000 square meters and consists of 17 buildings and 9 courtyards. So,the overall architectural ambiance of the Palace is a careful amalgam of Middle Eastern and Crimean Tatar tradition. Moreover gardens and a life-giving, sustaining, and purifying supply of water is the focal point of the Palace’s design. The Big Khan Mosque is one of the oldest structures in the Palace, dating back to 1532, in short of the best heritage of cultural tourism. The Mosque is one of the largest in Crimea and bears the name of Sahib I Giray as its commissioner. The entry into the mosque is from a portal facing north. In addition, the mosque is made by Ottoman-designed. The roof, a narthex, and porticos are covering the main prayer hall. From the porticos, rise two minarets to the height of 28 meters.The minarets are octagonal and adorned with conical tops and finials. The lead and glass are decorating the minarets with imitation stones. The walls of the Mosque contain murals; depicting Quranic inscriptions and Islamic symbology. The calligraphic adeptness of these murals is phenomenal and bears a proud testimony to the skills of Persian artists. To sum up, the murals appear in green cartouches on the main façade of the Mosque and add to the charm of wood and plasterwork.

programme.title: Khan Palace
programme.desc: We show you one of the best heritage of cultural tourism, as known The Khan's Palace. In the Crimean heartland, the longest-lived of the Turkic khanates left an even more enduring landmark, The Khan's Palace; in other words, home to the Crimean Tatars. Raised in the 16th century, Khan’s Palace served as a palace for the representatives of the Giray dynasty. Located in the city of Bakhchisaray, the palace was the political, spiritual, and cultural epicenter of the Crimean Tatars. Above all, n the the Palace has the limestone mountains, pristine forest slopes, and orchards.Khan's Palace is a complex containing majestic mosques, menacing courtrooms, a hidden harem, a fountain of tears, and sorrowful tombs. The earliest dated construction in this ensemble bears the date of 1532, while the written records mention the Palace under 1539.The Palace stretches more than 50000 square meters and consists of 17 buildings and 9 courtyards. So,the overall architectural ambiance of the Palace is a careful amalgam of Middle Eastern and Crimean Tatar tradition. Moreover gardens and a life-giving, sustaining, and purifying supply of water is the focal point of the Palace’s design. The Big Khan Mosque is one of the oldest structures in the Palace, dating back to 1532, in short of the best heritage of cultural tourism. The Mosque is one of the largest in Crimea and bears the name of Sahib I Giray as its commissioner. The entry into the mosque is from a portal facing north. In addition, the mosque is made by Ottoman-designed. The roof, a narthex, and porticos are covering the main prayer hall. From the porticos, rise two minarets to the height of 28 meters.The minarets are octagonal and adorned with conical tops and finials. The lead and glass are decorating the minarets with imitation stones. The walls of the Mosque contain murals; depicting Quranic inscriptions and Islamic symbology. The calligraphic adeptness of these murals is phenomenal and bears a proud testimony to the skills of Persian artists. To sum up, the murals appear in green cartouches on the main façade of the Mosque and add to the charm of wood and plasterwork.

programme.title: Khan Palace
programme.desc: We show you one of the best heritage of cultural tourism, as known The Khan's Palace. In the Crimean heartland, the longest-lived of the Turkic khanates left an even more enduring landmark, The Khan's Palace; in other words, home to the Crimean Tatars. Raised in the 16th century, Khan’s Palace served as a palace for the representatives of the Giray dynasty. Located in the city of Bakhchisaray, the palace was the political, spiritual, and cultural epicenter of the Crimean Tatars. Above all, n the the Palace has the limestone mountains, pristine forest slopes, and orchards.Khan's Palace is a complex containing majestic mosques, menacing courtrooms, a hidden harem, a fountain of tears, and sorrowful tombs. The earliest dated construction in this ensemble bears the date of 1532, while the written records mention the Palace under 1539.The Palace stretches more than 50000 square meters and consists of 17 buildings and 9 courtyards. So,the overall architectural ambiance of the Palace is a careful amalgam of Middle Eastern and Crimean Tatar tradition. Moreover gardens and a life-giving, sustaining, and purifying supply of water is the focal point of the Palace’s design. The Big Khan Mosque is one of the oldest structures in the Palace, dating back to 1532, in short of the best heritage of cultural tourism. The Mosque is one of the largest in Crimea and bears the name of Sahib I Giray as its commissioner. The entry into the mosque is from a portal facing north. In addition, the mosque is made by Ottoman-designed. The roof, a narthex, and porticos are covering the main prayer hall. From the porticos, rise two minarets to the height of 28 meters.The minarets are octagonal and adorned with conical tops and finials. The lead and glass are decorating the minarets with imitation stones. The walls of the Mosque contain murals; depicting Quranic inscriptions and Islamic symbology. The calligraphic adeptness of these murals is phenomenal and bears a proud testimony to the skills of Persian artists. To sum up, the murals appear in green cartouches on the main façade of the Mosque and add to the charm of wood and plasterwork.

programme.title: How Not to Die
programme.desc: How Not to Die is a bold feature documentary that confronts the greatest threat to human health—our diet. Based on the international bestselling book of the same name, by Dr. Michael Greger, this movie plays like a fast-paced action thriller but is packed with hard-hitting data that just might save your life. How Not to Die exposes the role of the standard Western diet in fueling today’s most widespread illnesses. The film offers jaw-dropping, but evidence-based, insights into the prevention of heart disease, type 2 diabetes, obesity, kidney disease, liver dysfunction, and a spectrum of brain disorders, including dementia and Alzheimer’s disease. It also addresses how diet influences the development of colon, prostate, and other digestive cancers, delivering life-saving information with clarity and authority.

programme.title: Impostora
programme.desc: Nimfa, an ugly street vender, meets jeremy, a talented plastice surgeon, in a car accident. To compensate for what happened, jeremy offers to help Nimfa by giving her new face through surgery. In her desire to change her life and escape her situation, she willingly undergoes complete facial reconstruction. She later discovers that her face is copied from Rosette, a wealthy and married woman who happens to be jeremy's lover. Rosette wants to escape her life with her husband and their kids. Forced to accept her circumstance, Nimfa becomes an imposer so Rosette and Jeremy can get away with their affair.

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Arctique Canadien
programme.desc: Le règne du blanc. Les membres de l'expédition The Explorers partent à la découverte de l'Arctique canadien, une région emblématique du bouleversement climatique qui touche notre planète. Pour être au plus près d'une civilisation et d'une nature en pleine mutation, pour témoigner de l'évolution de la vie sur ces terres glaciales, l'expédition a parcouru le Grand Nord Canadien, du printemps au début de l'hiver.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo de Nueva Caledonia
programme.desc: The Explorers sobrevolaron Nueva Caledonia, este excepcional territorio francés, para poner de relieve sus excepcionales riquezas naturales y culturales. Esta expedición aérea nos ofrece otra mirada a bosques profundos y milenarios, montañas de vegetación exuberante, islas paradisíacas, una cultura ancestral, una laguna y arrecifes de coral que albergan ecosistemas intactos poblados por una biodiversidad notable.

programme.title: Tiempo para nuestro cuerpo y mente
programme.desc: Lorena Roman nos introduce en el bow spring con una clase magistral para princiantes

programme.title: Mont Tabor, Israel
programme.desc: Le mont Tabor est une colline historique dans le nord d’Israel, dominant la vallee de Jezreel et reconnue pour sa forme arrondie remarquable. Venere depuis des siecles, il possede une grande importance religieuse, notamment dans la tradition chretienne comme lieu de la Transfiguration, et offre des vues panoramiques impressionnantes sur le paysage environnant.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Nueva Caledonia, tierra de maravillas terrestres
programme.desc: Con la tripulación de El Explorador, descubra los confines del hemisferio sur, rumbo al archipiélago Austral. El barco atraca en Rairoa, el puerto y pueblo principal de Raivavae. Una vez desembarcado el helicóptero, el equipo se pone en marcha para ofrecer imágenes aéreas del paraíso.

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Nouvelle Calédonie, au Pays des Merveilles de la Terre
programme.desc: The Explorers, menée par Olivier Chiabodo, a déployé ses équipes pour réaliser, en images, l’inventaire des merveilles naturelles d'une terre découverte par l’explorateur anglais James Cook en 1774 : la Nouvelle-Calédonie. Mais également découvrir la culture des premiers habitants de l'île, les Mélanésiens.

programme.title: Kursi, Parc National, Israel
programme.desc: Le parc national de Kursi en Israel est un site archeologique et historique situe sur la rive est de la mer de Galilee. Il conserve les vestiges d’un monastere et d’une eglise byzantins, traditionnellement consideres comme le lieu du miracle des porcs de Geraseens par Jesus, et offre aux visiteurs des vues panoramiques, des mosaïques anciennes et un aperçu de l’histoire chretienne ancienne.

programme.title: Little Alien
programme.desc: Juma and Hishame attempt an extremely dangerous journey to Europe by hiding in the chassis of a truck, while Ahmed, Nura, Achmad and Asha mange to climb the fences. These teens risk life and limb to make it to Europe. Once here, they have to deal with the trauma of loss as well as long odysseys through a maze of governmental agencies.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Hippos, Israel
programme.desc: Hippos (Sussita) est une ancienne ville greco-romaine situee sur une colline surplombant la mer de Galilee dans le nord d’Israel. Fondee a l’epoque hellenistique, elle a prospere en tant que partie de la Decapole et est aujourd’hui connue pour ses impressionnantes ruines, ses rues, ses temples, sa basilique et ses portes de ville, temoignant d’un riche melange de culture classique et d’histoire chretienne ancienne.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Polinesia Meridional
programme.desc: La loca geografía de la tierra de los hombres. El archipiélago de las Marquesas, formado por catorce islotes, es el más septentrional de los archipiélagos de Polinesia y, sin duda, el más aislado del mundo.

programme.title: Floating

And there is already a sperm donor for the child, the contract is as good as signed, everything seems lined up. For Katha's bachelorette party, her childhood friend Charly has come up with a special surprise: a weekend with "the boys".

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: Amor Musical
programme.desc: Todo inicia cuando son transferidos a la escuela Jung San que recibe auspicio por parte de una fundación millonaria y poderosa. Como es de esperarse, los días escolares en esta escuela se convierte en una lucha sin fin. Cada día enfrentan el gran abismo entre el rico y el pobre. Ante la cruda realidad, en lo único que pueden confiar es en su música. Tocar con sus amigos es la única cosa que los mantiene vivos, al mismo tiempo, Su música los hace brillar por encima de los demás. “Amor Musical” es un drama musical como nunca antes visto; al mejor estilo y creado para el sentimiento punk.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Surf, skate en Brasil, surf trip de surfistas jovenes, torneos de surf

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Arctique Canadien

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Site de bapteme de Yardenit, Israel
programme.desc: Le site de baptême de Yardenit est un lieu paisible et sacre situe sur le fleuve Jourdain dans le nord d’Israel. Reconnu comme un site traditionnel associe au baptême de Jesus, il accueille des pelerins du monde entier pour la reflexion spirituelle, la priere et les ceremonies de baptême dans un cadre naturel serein.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Huellas un hombre que camina- un viaje , una expedicion de 100 dias a la antartida

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole d'Olivier, Marie et Veronique - Mali
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. Ils ont compris que seule l’instruction leur permettra d’ameliorer leur vie, et c’est pour cela que chaque jour, dans des paysages incroyables, ils se lancent dans un periple a haut risque qui les conduira vers le savoir.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Polinesia de Gambier
programme.desc: The Explorers presenta una imagen no sólo bella, sino profundamente viva. En estas balsas de coral abandonadas por los volcanes, la vida se ha reinventado. De la nada, poco a poco, ha creado oasis, cada vez más ricos, con su propio equilibrio y tempo, el latido de los canales que riegan el atolón.

programme.title: Un Amor Duradero
programme.desc: La historia sigue a dos personas diferentes, Andeng (Bea Alonzo) y Anton (Ian Veneracion), que demostrarán que dos corazones rotos pueden hacer que su amor dure o no.

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Nouvelle Calédonie, au Pays des Merveilles de la Terre
programme.desc: The Explorers, menée par Olivier Chiabodo, a déployé ses équipes pour réaliser, en images, l’inventaire des merveilles naturelles d'une terre découverte par l’explorateur anglais James Cook en 1774 : la Nouvelle-Calédonie. Mais également découvrir la culture des premiers habitants de l'île, les Mélanésiens.

programme.title: Vidas Bienestar Con Estilo
programme.sub-title: Basquet Musica Superacion Sindrome de down
programme.desc: La serie presenta historias inspiradoras de personas que han hecho del bienestar una forma de vida. A traves de deportistas, aventureros y protagonistas del mundo saludable, cada episodio revela experiencias de superacion, conexion con la naturaleza y estilos de vida que promueven equilibrio, salud y armona.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Nation Estate
programme.desc: A vertical solution to the Israeli-Palestinian conflict has been found for the political deadlock in the Middle East. Palestinians have their state in the form of a skyscraper. The building is called the NATION ESTATE. One colossal high-rise houses the entire Palestinian population – who are now finally living 'the high life'.

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole de YANG Jiaojiao - Chine
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. programme.title: China Reverse
programme.desc: Film director Judith Benedikt embarks on a journey following first and second-generation immigrants from China in Austria, who are mainly stranded in Asian restaurants in the city and in the countryside. After half a century of migration, mainly in one direction, there is a new current flowing back to the East thanks to the economic boom in China.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf
programme.desc: The summer holidays have just begun in the small Brandenburg town of Niendorf, but ten-year-old Lea is not going to the summer camp with her friends this year as usual. In fact, she finds the other girls in her school increasingly peculiar. So Lea mostly wanders through the village alone on her bike and visits the musician and dropout Mark.

programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: Vidas Bienestar Con Estilo
programme.desc: La serie presenta historias inspiradoras de personas que han hecho del bienestar una forma de vida. A traves de deportistas, aventureros y protagonistas del mundo saludable, cada episodio revela experiencias de superacion, conexion con la naturaleza y estilos de vida que promueven equilibrio, salud y armona.

programme.title: Impostora
programme.desc: Nimfa, an ugly street vender, meets jeremy, a talented plastice surgeon, in a car accident. To compensate for what happened, jeremy offers to help Nimfa by giving her new face through surgery. In her desire to change her life and escape her situation, she willingly undergoes complete facial reconstruction. She later discovers that her face is copied from Rosette, a wealthy and married woman who happens to be jeremy's lover. Rosette wants to escape her life with her husband and their kids. Forced to accept her circumstance, Nimfa becomes an imposer so Rosette and Jeremy can get away with their affair.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo sobre Sudáfrica
programme.desc: En el corazón del Mediterráneo, Los Exploradores sobrevuelan la montañosa isla de Córcega, rodeada por 1.000 km de aguas turquesas. Presume de una gran variedad de paisajes: el desierto de Agriates, los jardines de Balagne, las Calanques de Piana, lagos de gran altitud y playas inmaculadas.

programme.title: Eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste et Eglise Terra Sancta, Israel
programme.desc: L’eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste a Ein Kerem est une eglise franciscaine du XIXe siecle, construite sur les ruines byzantines et croisees anterieures, marquant le lieu traditionnel de naissance de Jean-Baptiste.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo de Honduras
programme.desc: Descubra los tesoros de Honduras, un país y una cultura poco conocidos

programme.title: Tel Afek (Fort Antipatris), Israel
programme.desc: Antipatris est un site archeologique riche situe sur la cote mediterraneenne israelienne. La ville fortifiee de Tel Afek, a mi-chemin entre Jerusalem et Cesaree, se trouve aujourd’hui dans un parc calme et silencieux. Le site est proche des sources perennes de la riviere Yarkon et fait desormais partie du parc national de Yarkon en Israel. Plus de 6 000 ans de villes successives se sont construites sur la colline surplombant les sources de la riviere Yarkon.

programme.title: Rocket Perelman
programme.desc: The gimmicks in the fashion industry got on Jen's nerves (Liv Lisa Fries). So she goes on the road looking for new horizons and ends up at the "Rocket Perelman", a commune in the Brandenburg sand box, where a different way of life is preached by Tobias (Tobias Lehmann): live free, be creative and follow your instincts.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Honduras
programme.desc: Los Exploradores, dirigidos por Olivier Chiabodo, desplegaron sus equipos para elaborar un inventario pictórico de las maravillas naturales de una tierra descubierta por el explorador inglés James Cook en 1774: Nueva Caledonia. Pero también para descubrir la cultura de los primeros habitantes de la isla, los melanesios.

programme.title: Encuentros Que Generan Bienestar
programme.desc: Encuentros y conversaciones con personas, proyectos y experiencias que promueven el bienestar y una vida mas consciente. A traves de historias vinculadas al deporte, la naturaleza, la salud y el desarrollo personal, cada episodio invita a descubrir nuevas formas de vivir con equilibrio.

programme.title: Feldarbeit
programme.desc: In calm and exploring images between the poles of documentary and fiction, Henrike Meyer is reaching out, looking for some kind of reconciliation. The filmmaker accompanies her father during the harvest, an exhausting time that leaves little or no room for any form of familiar daily routine. This makes FELDARBEIT an actual portrait of fieldwork.

programme.title: Kleptomami
programme.desc: Lucy (Rosalie Thomass) regularly shoplifts at the supermarket with her baby in the stroller. One day she is confronted by the store detective and reveals her secret to him. Lucy is tired of pretending to be the perfect mother. "She is torn between her own aspirations and the reality in which they find themselves after the birth of their child." (Director's comment - Pola Beck).

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: Swimmers
programme.desc: The controversial Soviet physicist Boris Zolotov left science to start a movement. He has gathered hundreds of disciples around him. Like many in the group, young Ekaterina was led there by many unanswered questions. Together with Boris Zolotov, she takes part in hour-long swimming rituals and night-time theater performances and discusses concepts of happiness in today´s Russia.

programme.title: Eglise Saint Lazare, Israel
programme.desc: Plusieurs terrains ont ete acquis par la Custodie franciscaine de Terre Sainte, y compris ce terrain en 1863 pres du tombeau de Lazare. Entre 1952 et 1955, sur les ruines anciennes de plusieurs eglises, une eglise moderne dediee a Saint Lazare a ete construite. En effet, le tombeau de Lazare se trouve a proximite de l’eglise.

programme.title: Un Amor Duradero

programme.title: Brother
programme.desc: Lukasz (24) wants to get out of crisis mode. He yearns for recognition and loyalty. As tough thug for Hamburg's main man, he believes he's found it all. While Lukasz's rise up the ladder begins to take shape, the death of their mother brings his little brother Kamil (13) to Lukasz's front door after a long break in contact.

programme.title: Alimentacion Saludable
programme.desc: Un recorrido por proyectos, productores y especialistas que promueven una alimentacion saludable y consciente. Cada episodio descubre alimentos naturales, iniciativas agroecologicas y propuestas culinarias que combinan salud, sustentabilidad y bienestar en la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Beit She'arim, Israel (Partie 2)
programme.desc: Beit She’arim, 2 episodes sur une ville greco-romaine, celebre site archeologique remarquable pour sa necropole. Vous decouvrirez une serie de catacombes, tunnels et cavernes.

programme.title: Who Am I Happy

programme.title: Beat Beat Heart
programme.desc: Kerstin (Lana Cooper) believes in love with all her heart and has been waiting for the return of her ex-boyfriend Thomas (Till Wonka) for months. She wallows in sweet memories when her mother Charlotte (Saskia Vester) suddenly turns up and wants to move into her apartment.

programme.title: Lockbuster
programme.desc: When all his colleagues leave the office for exciting holidays, office clerk Joost locks himself in the storage room. The only way to escape is to unleash the hero within himself.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Ártico canadiense
programme.desc: El reinado del hombre blanco. Los miembros de la expedición The Explorers parten al descubrimiento del Ártico canadiense, una región emblemática de los trastornos climáticos que afectan a nuestro planeta. Para acercarse lo más posible a una civilización y una naturaleza en plena mutación, y ser testigos de la evolución de la vida en estas tierras heladas, la expedición recorre el Extremo Norte canadiense, desde la primavera hasta principios del invierno.

programme.title: Abbaye benedictine d’Abu Gosh, Israel
programme.desc: Situe pres de Jerusalem, dans le village d’Abu Gosh, ce monastere benedictin est l’un des plus beaux vestiges des Croises et l’un des mieux conserves en Israel. Il s’agit d’une eglise gothique construite par les Hospitaliers en 1140. En 1889, le gouvernement français acquiert ce magnifique monastere et le site passe sous la supervision des peres benedictins français.

programme.title: Black Panther – The Story of Emilie and Jacob
programme.desc: Emilie shares her sadness about the loss of their parents, but also a well-hidden secret. Can the two siblings really live a love that must remain invisible, a love that is source of hope and fear at the same time. Samuel Perriard's stylized corporeality - the extremely closeup, high resolution erotic sequences - are an ode to the beauty of the forbidden.

programme.title: Basilique de Jesus l’Adolescent, Israel
programme.desc: La basilique de Jesus l’Adolescent, egalement appelee simplement eglise salesienne, est une eglise catholique a Nazareth en Israel, appartenant aux Salesiens de Don Bosco. Situee a cote de l’ecole des Salesiens, elle a ete construite entre 1906 et 1923 sur une colline appelee Mont du Debut, qui surplombe la ville, où, selon la tradition, Jesus a passe sa jeunesse. De la terrasse de l’eglise, la vue sur la vieille ville de Nazareth est exceptionnelle, divisee en quartiers orthodoxe, catholique romain et musulman.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: All About Rita
programme.desc: Rita drives everyone crazy and everyone drives Rita crazy. Randy lives in Berlin now. Paula and Louise don't live together anymore. Paula is pregnant and nobody knows who the father is. Max is still lovesick over Paula, gets drunk with Rita and at the end they make out. Rita, confused, goes to Berlin to think...

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Islas Marquesas
programme.desc: The Explorers atraviesa la inmensidad de Sudáfrica, desde el desierto del Kalahari hasta la meseta central, pasando por los parques Kruger e Isimangaliso.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Ein Kerem, la Revelation chretienne, Israel (Partie 2)
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, lieu de naissance de Saint Jean-Baptiste et de la visite de Marie, est egalement un site touristique chic et pittoresque.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Huellas un hombre que camina- un viaje , una expedicion de 100 dias a la antartida

programme.title: Amor Musical
programme.desc: Todo inicia cuando son transferidos a la escuela Jung San que recibe auspicio por parte de una fundación millonaria y poderosa. Como es de esperarse, los días escolares en esta escuela se convierte en una lucha sin fin. Cada día enfrentan el gran abismo entre el rico y el pobre. Ante la cruda realidad, en lo único que pueden confiar es en su música. Tocar con sus amigos es la única cosa que los mantiene vivos, al mismo tiempo, Su música los hace brillar por encima de los demás. “Amor Musical” es un drama musical como nunca antes visto; al mejor estilo y creado para el sentimiento punk.

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Nouvelle Calédonie, au Pays des Merveilles de la Terre
programme.desc: The Explorers, menée par Olivier Chiabodo, a déployé ses équipes pour réaliser, en images, l’inventaire des merveilles naturelles d'une terre découverte par l’explorateur anglais James Cook en 1774 : la Nouvelle-Calédonie. Mais également découvrir la culture des premiers habitants de l'île, les Mélanésiens.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: Des Racines et des ailes - Passion Patrimoine
programme.sub-title: Sur les rives de la Garonne
programme.desc: Des Pyrenees espagnoles ou elle prend sa source, au vaste estuaire de la Gironde ou elle se jette, la Garonne parcourt plus de 600 kilometres a travers le Comminges, l'Agenais ou l'Entre-deux-Mers. Le fleuve evolue au cours de ce long voyage. L'apport de ses affluents, comme la Neste, l'Ariege, le Tarn et le Lot, modifie son visage. A bord d'un helicoptere, Didier Taillefer part en Espagne pour faire des photos aeriennes de l'une des principales sources du fleuve : le Trou du Toro. Ce site exceptionnel est situe au pied du massif de la Maladeta, ou la Garonne disparaît sous terre avant de reapparaître au Val d'Artan. Au coeur des Pyrenees, le fleuve donne naissance a un jardin de Cocagne : le Comminges. Dans le village de Huos, Remy Martin a amenage un verger-potager bio sur un ancien meandre.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Huellas un hombre que camina- un viaje , una expedicion de 100 dias a la antartida

programme.title: Clumsy Little Acts of Tenderness
programme.desc: A weekend dad wants to show his teenage daughter his love by taking her to a car wash, but instead of the car wash, they end up on a life-changing adventure at the supermarket, at the endless sanitary napkin display. They get "help" from an older lady who shares stories that might be just a bit too intimate.

programme.title: Indonesia: Bosques de lo extraño
programme.desc: Los Exploradores se adentran en un mundo extraño y desconcertante en los últimos bosques de Indonesia. Los árboles son el epítome de la rareza, como las higueras estranguladoras: estos gigantes asfixian al árbol que los cobija y al mismo tiempo dan cobijo a una fauna increíble.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: "I only understood how powerful light is after I went blind." A documentary about three blind photographers: Pete Eckert, Sonia Soberats and Bruce Hall - three exhibiting artists. What do they see in their mind's eyes? "Even with no input the brain keeps creating images," says Pete Eckert. Sonia Soberats states, "I only understood how powerful light is after I went blind.

programme.title: Momento yoga
programme.sub-title: Relacion entre el Psoas y el diafragma
programme.desc: Lorena Maldonado Amnrita Maa nos adentra en la relacion entre el Psoas y el diafragma con ejercicios de respiracion y yoga

programme.title: Ghetto
programme.desc: "The biggest damn ghetto" is what the school caretaker calls the classroom where Xhumi and Müke spend the last few months of their school days. Ana's hands get sweaty when it comes to the question of her professional future. Oli is already standing outside - in the alley.

programme.title: Un Amor Duradero
programme.desc: La historia sigue a dos personas diferentes, Andeng (Bea Alonzo) y Anton (Ian Veneracion), que demostrarán que dos corazones rotos pueden hacer que su amor dure o no.

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Arctique Canadien
programme.desc: Le règne du blanc. Les membres de l'expédition The Explorers partent à la découverte de l'Arctique canadien, une région emblématique du bouleversement climatique qui touche notre planète. Pour être au plus près d'une civilisation et d'une nature en pleine mutation, pour témoigner de l'évolution de la vie sur ces terres glaciales, l'expédition a parcouru le Grand Nord Canadien, du printemps au début de l'hiver.

programme.title: Momento yoga
programme.desc: Valeria Azato y el yoga integral y la posibilidad de establecer bienestar para todas la edades llevando adelante yoga con silla conectando nuestro cuerpo y mente

programme.title: El Vuelo de Polynesia des islas Societe y Tuamotu
programme.desc: The Explorers parte hacia las encantadoras islas de la Sociedad y Tuamotu, en la Polinesia Francesa, siguiendo la estela de los grandes exploradores. Atolones y lagunas de aguas cristalinas, rodeadas de arrecifes de coral: Tetiaroa es un santuario de tortugas y aves marinas.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Impostora
programme.desc: Nimfa, an ugly street vender, meets jeremy, a talented plastice surgeon, in a car accident. To compensate for what happened, jeremy offers to help Nimfa by giving her new face through surgery. In her desire to change her life and escape her situation, she willingly undergoes complete facial reconstruction. She later discovers that her face is copied from Rosette, a wealthy and married woman who happens to be jeremy's lover. Rosette wants to escape her life with her husband and their kids. Forced to accept her circumstance, Nimfa becomes an imposer so Rosette and Jeremy can get away with their affair.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo de Córcega
programme.desc: En el corazón del Mediterráneo, Los Exploradores sobrevuelan la montañosa isla de Córcega, con sus 1.000 km de costa turquesa. Presume de una gran variedad de paisajes: el desierto de Agriates, los jardines de Balagne, las Calanques de Piana, lagos de gran altitud y playas inmaculadas.

programme.desc: Virginia Lovotrico MASTER Trainer Pilates, profesora e instructo internacional nos lleva al univeso Pilates , diferentes clases en Matte, Reformer, columpios mostrando y enseñandonos los beneficios del Pilates

programme.title: Iditarod, la derniere course Nicolas Vanier
programme.desc: L’iditarod est la course de chiens de traineaux la plus emblematique au monde traversant tout l’Alaska sur 1700km. Nicolas Vanier, grand passionne des territoires du Grand Nord et musher experimente, est celebre pour ses defis polaires sur tous les territoires glaces. L’Iditarod sera son ultime pari.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo de Francia, Provenza Alpes Costa Azul
programme.desc: The Explorers le cuentan la historia de una región del sureste de Francia, rica en contrastes... La historia de una región imposible de resumir en una sola palabra, por la infinita variedad de sus paisajes y culturas. Es la región Sur, también conocida como Provenza-Alpes-Costa Azul... Una región con tres caras.

programme.title: Fraulein
programme.desc: Ruža left her home country Serbia over 30 years ago and now lives in Zurich. Her daily life is painstakingly organized but one day, Ana arrives on the scene. Ana, a young woman from Sarajevo, is beautiful, hungry for life yet somehow lost, and she shakes up Ruza's world. Nonetheless, a tender friendship develops between these two headstrong women.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo Ártico
programme.desc: El Explorador le lleva entre los océanos Atlántico y Pacífico, sobre la inmensidad de los bosques y manglares de Honduras, a menudo envueltos en niebla. La selva alberga las pirámides de piedra de la ciudad perdida de Copán, vestigios del pueblo maya, hoy Patrimonio Mundial de la UNESCO.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo de Nueva Caledonia
programme.desc: The Explorers sobrevolaron Nueva Caledonia, este excepcional territorio francés, para poner de relieve sus excepcionales riquezas naturales y culturales. Esta expedición aérea nos ofrece otra mirada a bosques profundos y milenarios, montañas de vegetación exuberante, islas paradisíacas, una cultura ancestral, una laguna y arrecifes de coral que albergan ecosistemas intactos poblados por una biodiversidad notable.

programme.title: Honey and Ashes
programme.desc: Honey and Ashes sheds light on the story and fate of three women trapped between tradition and modern life in North Africa today. Naima, a doctor, Amina, a graduate, and Leila, a young student, are pursuing their individual routes to an independent life when their paths cross. “Fares’ script is intelligent and dramatically involving.

programme.title: Ashkelon (Parc National), Israel
programme.desc: Ashkelon, une ville sur la cote mediterraneenne d’Israel. Le parc comprend Tel Ashkelon et les vestiges de l’ancienne Ashkelon, entoures par la muraille cananeenne, ainsi que 1 000 dunams de dunes de sable et de kurkar au sud du parc, entre la muraille et le site du pipeline Eilat-Ashkelon.

programme.title: Alimentacion saludable
programme.desc: Augusto Torres parrillero profesional nos lleva en el paso a paso de un asador criollo, la importancia de dejar descansar previamente los corte de carne y la importancia del fuego, costillar, vacio, entraña, matambre, provoleta, chorizo y morcilla, tradicion de sudamerica

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Nueva Caledonia, tierra de maravillas terrestres
programme.desc: Con la tripulación de El Explorador, descubra los confines del hemisferio sur, rumbo al archipiélago Austral. El barco atraca en Rairoa, el puerto y pueblo principal de Raivavae. Una vez desembarcado el helicóptero, el equipo se pone en marcha para ofrecer imágenes aéreas del paraíso.

programme.desc: The anonymous Berlin concrete building "Excelsior" is only a temporary stop for its residents, yet some have been living there for more than 50 years. Claudia's time as a dancer is over, but new photos are to pave her way back onto the stage.

programme.title: Papa Gold
programme.desc: Denny has a mother. This mother has a new husband, Frank. Together they have a new baby. Denny has not spoken to his mother for 10 years. Frank wants to change that now. He travels to Berlin. Who will be the first to grow up? A sensitively portrayed tragicomedy by upcoming star director Tom Lass and outstanding acting by the charismatic Peter Trabner. Winner of the German Film Critics Prize.

programme.title: HomeSick

programme.title: Eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste, Israel
programme.desc: Une promenade dans le charmant village d’Ein Kerem, situe sur les pentes occidentales de Jerusalem, pour decouvrir l’eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste, egalement connue sous le nom de Saint Jean-Baptiste BaHarim, ce qui signifie Saint Jean-Baptiste dans les montagnes en hebreu.

programme.title: Lost in the Living
programme.desc: Buzzing with lust for adventure, a musician from Dublin and his band move to Berlin. Oisín leaves behind the weight of losing his mother, and anger towards his absent father. Oisín meets Sabine, a pretty Berliner who shows him the city's secret places: cool parks, deserted subway stations, skinny dipping lakes in the countryside.

programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo de Honduras
programme.desc: Descubra los tesoros de Honduras, un país y una cultura poco conocidos

programme.title: Beyhadh
programme.desc: Maya es una joven magnate de los negocios que ha triunfado en el mundo corporativo. Ella se enamora perdidamente de Arjun, un apuesto galán que ama la fotografía. En la misma empresa trabaja Saanjh, una bella joven enamoradiza.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole de Maribel et Juan Jose- Baja California Sur
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. Ils ont compris que seule l’instruction leur permettra d’ameliorer leur vie, et c’est pour cela que chaque jour, dans des paysages incroyables, ils se lancent dans un periple a haut risque qui les conduira vers le savoir.

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Arctique Canadien
programme.desc: Le règne du blanc. Les membres de l'expédition The Explorers partent à la découverte de l'Arctique canadien, une région emblématique du bouleversement climatique qui touche notre planète. Pour être au plus près d'une civilisation et d'une nature en pleine mutation, pour témoigner de l'évolution de la vie sur ces terres glaciales, l'expédition a parcouru le Grand Nord Canadien, du printemps au début de l'hiver.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Honduras
programme.desc: Los Exploradores, dirigidos por Olivier Chiabodo, desplegaron sus equipos para elaborar un inventario pictórico de las maravillas naturales de una tierra descubierta por el explorador inglés James Cook en 1774: Nueva Caledonia. Pero también para descubrir la cultura de los primeros habitantes de la isla, los melanesios.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: Frontalwatte
programme.desc: Dramedy Frontalwatte- feature debut by Jakob Lass and his graduation film from from film school jumpstarted the German Mumblecore movement. With his brother, actor and director Tom (PAPA GOLD), Jakob Lass has developed a fresh, improvisation-based style, including his own manifesto, FOGMA.

programme.title: Eglise de la Nativite, Israel
programme.desc: L’eglise de la Nativite est situee a Bethleem, au sud de Jerusalem. En 327, l’eglise de la Nativite a ete commandee par Constantin le Grand et sa mere Helene sur le site traditionnellement considere comme la grotte marquant le lieu de naissance de Jesus

programme.title: Tiempo para nuestro cuerpo y mente
programme.desc: Patricia Torres nos ilustra acerca del reiki y lo eterico acopañamos una sesion de Reiki, con terapia de cuarzos y otros elementos ancestrales

programme.title: Un Amor Duradero
programme.desc: La historia sigue a dos personas diferentes, Andeng (Bea Alonzo) y Anton (Ian Veneracion), que demostrarán que dos corazones rotos pueden hacer que su amor dure o no.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Le Grand Inventaire de la Planète: Nouvelle Calédonie, au Pays des Merveilles de la Terre
programme.desc: The Explorers, menée par Olivier Chiabodo, a déployé ses équipes pour réaliser, en images, l’inventaire des merveilles naturelles d'une terre découverte par l’explorateur anglais James Cook en 1774 : la Nouvelle-Calédonie. Mais également découvrir la culture des premiers habitants de l'île, les Mélanésiens.

programme.title: In die Welt - Into the World
programme.desc: In all its intensity and diversity, the everyday miracle of birth is shown with the means of direct cinema, without commentary, interviews or explanation, and connected to the cycle of standardized processes in the Viennese hospital. A chronicle of the beginning of life and its organization.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Indonesia por la Ruta de Papúa
programme.desc: Con la tripulación de The Explorer, descubre los confines del hemisferio sur, rumbo al archipiélago de Gambier. Allí, la tripulación es testigo de un ballet de ballenas jorobadas que buscan refugio en estas cálidas aguas.

programme.title: Eglise du Primat de Saint Pierre, Israel
programme.desc: La petite eglise, entretenue par l’ordre catholique des moines franciscains, a ete reconstruite sur des ruines anciennes en 1933 et restauree en 1982. Depuis 1933, les Franciscains de la Custodie de Terre Sainte assurent les services religieux et pastoraux.

programme.title: Family Fever
programme.desc: Maja's and Uwe's marriage is stuck in a rut. However, Alina, their daughter, is head over heels in love with Nico. She invites both sets of parents to meet in Brandenburg, but a clandestine and surprising love affair wrecks havoc on the apparent harmony in the group. A German mumblecore tragicomedy set in a Brandenburg mansion.

programme.title: Encuentros Que Generan Bienestar
programme.desc: Encuentros y conversaciones con personas, proyectos y experiencias que promueven el bienestar y una vida mas consciente. A traves de historias vinculadas al deporte, la naturaleza, la salud y el desarrollo personal, cada episodio invita a descubrir nuevas formas de vivir con equilibrio.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Córcega
programme.desc: Los tesoros de una isla. La Isla de la Belleza, territorio francés de paisajes poderosos y naturaleza salvaje, ha sido conquistada a menudo, pero nunca sometida. Cultiva su carácter y su diferencia.
