programme.title: Eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste, Ein Karem, Israel
programme.desc: Une promenade dans le charmant village d’Ein Kerem, situe sur les pentes occidentales de Jerusalem, pour decouvrir l’eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste, egalement connue sous le nom de Saint Jean-Baptiste BaHarim, ce qui signifie Saint Jean-Baptiste dans les montagnes en hebreu.

programme.title: Of Neo-Nazis and Superheroes – How the Far Right is Changing a Small German Town
programme.desc: This small town has hosted right-wing rock concerts in the past, but now, remarkably, a diverse group of anti-right activists has emerged to challenge local right-wing organizations. The film offers new insights into how the societal shift to the right took place and how a right-wing parallel world that was able to establish itself in town and how creative forms of protest can flourish.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: El Cerro Mc Kinley en Alaska se presenta como un gran desafio para los montañistas

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Ártico canadiense
programme.desc: El reinado del hombre blanco. Los miembros de la expedición The Explorers parten al descubrimiento del Ártico canadiense, una región emblemática de los trastornos climáticos que afectan a nuestro planeta. Para acercarse lo más posible a una civilización y una naturaleza en plena mutación, y ser testigos de la evolución de la vida en estas tierras heladas, la expedición recorre el Extremo Norte canadiense, desde la primavera hasta principios del invierno.

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l’ecole de Jose Alfredo et Angel- Mexique
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. Ils ont compris que seule l’instruction leur permettra d’ameliorer leur vie, et c’est pour cela que chaque jour, dans des paysages incroyables, ils se lancent dans un periple a haut risque qui les conduira vers le savoir.

programme.title: Bella Solitaria
programme.desc: Go Dok Mi es una editora de libros, bastante tímida, se niega a abandonar su apartamento o interactuar con la gente de su alrededor lo mayor posible. Cada día, ella recibe de forma anónima una caja de leche con un Post-it pegado, el que sigue una historia uno tras otro. Todos los días, usando un par de binoculares de color amarillo ella mira a su vecino de enfrente, Han Tae Joon. La última vez que estuvo fuera, fue en un parque en un día de otoño, se había enamorado de Tae Joon, a primera vista, lo continuo mirando y se dio cuenta que adoptó un perro. Cuando miró por la ventana y vio que el vivía en el apartamento de al frente, ella lo asocio al destino.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Expedicion Mara Atlantica en el norte de Brasil se presentaba en los años 2001 como las mas extrema, una experiencia presente.

programme.title: Away You Go
programme.desc: Is growing up and becoming an adult easy? Charlie finds it damn hard to figure out how to separate the expectations of those around her from her own needs. Charlie is not at all sure: Is it so wonderful to have a baby, or will her own needs disappear in the process? Charlie's job as a teacher is very demanding, and things aren't really going well with Marco at the moment.

programme.title: Eglise du Saint-Sepulcre, Israel (Partie 1)
programme.desc: Une visite de l’eglise du Saint-Sepulcre, cœur de la ville sainte de Jerusalem. Situee dans le quartier chretien de Jerusalem, sur une petite place etroite, coincee entre les maisons de la vieille ville et au pied d’un minaret, l’eglise du Saint-Sepulcre se dresse au bout de la Via Dolorosa

programme.title: We will survive
programme.desc: In this retirement home, unique in Germany, seniors of any sexual orientation are offered more than a home in old age. The documentary short film WE WILL SURVIVE observes the humorous, heartfelt and yet not always entirely conflict-free everyday life at Frankfurt's Regenbogen retirement home, exploring the question of how we want to live and love in our twilight years.

programme.title: Vidas Bienestar Con Estilo
programme.sub-title: Basquet Musica Superacion Sindrome de down
programme.desc: La serie presenta historias inspiradoras de personas que han hecho del bienestar una forma de vida. A traves de deportistas, aventureros y protagonistas del mundo saludable, cada episodio revela experiencias de superacion, conexion con la naturaleza y estilos de vida que promueven equilibrio, salud y armona.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Sudáfrica
programme.desc: Savane Sauvage. Desde las montañas Drakensberg hasta el océano Índico, pasando por la sabana, la expedición The Explorers sigue el rastro de los "Cinco Grandes" y su salvaje procesión.

programme.title: El Gran Inventario del Planeta: Sudáfrica

programme.title: Eglise Sainte Anne et les Piscines de Bethesda, Israel
programme.desc: Situee au debut de la Via Dolorosa, l’eglise Sainte-Anne est le site traditionnel de la maison des grands-parents maternels de Jesus, Anne et Joachim, et du lieu de naissance de la Vierge Marie. Nichee au cœur des rues animees et des ruelles du quartier musulman, l’eglise Sainte-Anne, la mieux conservee des eglises croisees de Jerusalem, se distingue par sa tranquillite. Elle se trouve dans une cour entouree d’arbres et d’arbustes.

programme.title: Le Ciel, la Terre et L'Homme
programme.desc: Ahmed, Yussef, Lahcen and Idir live in the tension between a traditional, nomadic way of life and modern conveniences and problems. Caroline Reucker's film approaches these people, their stories of city and country, their everyday life, their longings and their sense of home and belonging.

programme.title: Kleptomami
programme.desc: Lucy (Rosalie Thomass) regularly shoplifts at the supermarket with her baby in the stroller. One day she is confronted by the store detective and reveals her secret to him. programme.title: In Heaven's Meadow
programme.desc: Maya awakes suddenly in Heaven Meadow. She is not dead, she is in Vienna. It is night. She checks out her body. What is she missing? Her shoes, that's for sure. The culprits are gone. Injured and without shoes, Maya runs back to the city - home. Without further ado she goes to Italy, to Daniel, her boyfriend.

programme.title: Blue Summer Symphony
programme.desc: The open-air swimming pool, a sociotope and microcosm of society: different people, half naked in a confined space, share an afternoon, a moment with each other and as quickly as it has come, so quickly it has gone again. That's the poetry inherent in the banality of everyday life.

programme.title: Happiness Is a Warm Gun
programme.desc: What happens to Petra Kelly as Bastian's bullet enters her head until the moment the bullet lodges in her brain and Petra dies? She has a flash-forward to the present and awakens in the glass transit of an international airport. On her trip through this modern purgatory, Petra struggles to make sense of her shooting, together with Gert and other people from her life.

programme.title: Indonesia: Bosques de lo extraño
programme.desc: Los Exploradores se adentran en un mundo extraño y desconcertante en los últimos bosques de Indonesia. Los árboles son el epítome de la rareza, como las higueras estranguladoras: estos gigantes asfixian al árbol que los cobija y al mismo tiempo dan cobijo a una fauna increíble.

programme.sub-title: Arjun Escala El Apartamento De Maya
programme.desc: Maya es una joven magnate de los negocios que ha triunfado en el mundo corporativo. Ella se enamora perdidamente de Arjun, un apuesto galán que ama la fotografía. En la misma empresa trabaja Saanjh, una bella joven enamoradiza.

programme.title: Fall Pinguin
programme.desc: Spurred by climate change, a special group of penguins migrates to Switzerland and heads to the last great glaciers of the mountain country to find their new home. King penguins represent incredible adaptability, familial loyalty, social community and unconventionality. The same is true of the group formed around Swiss artist Ralf Assmann.

programme.desc: Lorena Roman nos introduce en el bow spring con una clase magistral para princiantes

programme.title: Mont Tabor, Israel
programme.desc: Le mont Tabor est une colline historique dans le nord d’Israel, dominant la vallee de Jezreel et reconnue pour sa forme arrondie remarquable. Venere depuis des siecles, il possede une grande importance religieuse, notamment dans la tradition chretienne comme lieu de la Transfiguration, et offre des vues panoramiques impressionnantes sur le paysage environnant.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: Kursi, Parc National, Israel
programme.desc: Le parc national de Kursi en Israel est un site archeologique et historique situe sur la rive est de la mer de Galilee. Il conserve les vestiges d’un monastere et d’une eglise byzantins, traditionnellement consideres comme le lieu du miracle des porcs de Geraseens par Jesus, et offre aux visiteurs des vues panoramiques, des mosaïques anciennes et un aperçu de l’histoire chretienne ancienne.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: El Vuelo de Polynesia des islas Societe y Tuamotu
programme.desc: The Explorers parte hacia las encantadoras islas de la Sociedad y Tuamotu, en la Polinesia Francesa, siguiendo la estela de los grandes exploradores. Atolones y lagunas de aguas cristalinas, rodeadas de arrecifes de coral: Tetiaroa es un santuario de tortugas y aves marinas.

programme.title: Beyhadh
programme.desc: Maya es una joven magnate de los negocios que ha triunfado en el mundo corporativo. Ella se enamora perdidamente de Arjun, un apuesto galán que ama la fotografía. En la misma empresa trabaja Saanjh, una bella joven enamoradiza.

programme.title: After the Future
programme.desc: Gay left-wing activist and disaster relief volunteer Ortwin Passon navigates between a military-like bourgeois world and wild sex parties. For a while now, he has been writing a dissertation on barebacking (anal sex without condoms) and the political and judicial implications of unprotected intercourse among men in Germany.

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Es un dia especial para Salchi y Martin prepara una torta

programme.title: Hippos, Israel
programme.desc: Hippos (Sussita) est une ancienne ville greco-romaine situee sur une colline surplombant la mer de Galilee dans le nord d’Israel. Fondee a l’epoque hellenistique, elle a prospere en tant que partie de la Decapole et est aujourd’hui connue pour ses impressionnantes ruines, ses rues, ses temples, sa basilique et ses portes de ville, temoignant d’un riche melange de culture classique et d’histoire chretienne ancienne.

programme.title: El Gran Vuelo de Córcega
programme.desc: En el corazón del Mediterráneo, Los Exploradores sobrevuelan la montañosa isla de Córcega, con sus 1.000 km de costa turquesa. Presume de una gran variedad de paisajes: el desierto de Agriates, los jardines de Balagne, las Calanques de Piana, lagos de gran altitud y playas inmaculadas.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Surf, skate en Brasil, surf trip de surfistas jovenes, torneos de surf

programme.title: Deliciosisimo
programme.desc: Martin y Salchi vuelven a Deliciosisimo

programme.title: Everything Always All the Time
programme.desc: What happens when your girlfriend suddenly has a penis? Kim and Andreas are very happy - both with each other and with life. But Kim wants more. She wants a penis. Not because she would like to be a man, but simply because she is intriqued with the idea.

programme.title: Site de bapteme de Yardenit, Israel
programme.desc: Le site de baptême de Yardenit est un lieu paisible et sacre situe sur le fleuve Jourdain dans le nord d’Israel. Reconnu comme un site traditionnel associe au baptême de Jesus, il accueille des pelerins du monde entier pour la reflexion spirituelle, la priere et les ceremonies de baptême dans un cadre naturel serein.

programme.title: Un Amor Duradero
programme.desc: La historia sigue a dos personas diferentes, Andeng (Bea Alonzo) y Anton (Ian Veneracion), que demostrarán que dos corazones rotos pueden hacer que su amor dure o no.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Huellas un hombre que camina- un viaje , una expedicion de 100 dias a la antartida

programme.title: Monika
programme.desc: Monika has had limited vision since birth and takes care of her alcoholic mother. An eye operation is supposed to provide relief. However, this failed and Monika is now almost completely blind. While her mother is completely desperate and cannot cope with the situation, Monika regains her courage after the initial shock at a school for the blind.

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole d'Olivier, Marie et Veronique - Mali
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. Ils ont compris que seule l’instruction leur permettra d’ameliorer leur vie, et c’est pour cela que chaque jour, dans des paysages incroyables, ils se lancent dans un periple a haut risque qui les conduira vers le savoir.

programme.title: Vidas Bienestar Con Estilo
programme.sub-title: Basquet Musica Superacion Sindrome de down
programme.desc: La serie presenta historias inspiradoras de personas que han hecho del bienestar una forma de vida. A traves de deportistas, aventureros y protagonistas del mundo saludable, cada episodio revela experiencias de superacion, conexion con la naturaleza y estilos de vida que promueven equilibrio, salud y armona.

programme.title: Bella Solitaria
programme.desc: Go Dok Mi es una editora de libros, bastante tímida, se niega a abandonar su apartamento o interactuar con la gente de su alrededor lo mayor posible. Cada día, ella recibe de forma anónima una caja de leche con un Post-it pegado, el que sigue una historia uno tras otro. Todos los días, usando un par de binoculares de color amarillo ella mira a su vecino de enfrente, Han Tae Joon. La última vez que estuvo fuera, fue en un parque en un día de otoño, se había enamorado de Tae Joon, a primera vista, lo continuo mirando y se dio cuenta que adoptó un perro. Cuando miró por la ventana y vio que el vivía en el apartamento de al frente, ella lo asocio al destino.

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole de YANG Jiaojiao - Chine
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. Ils ont compris que seule l’instruction leur permettra d’ameliorer leur vie, et c’est pour cela que chaque jour, dans des paysages incroyables, ils se lancent dans un periple a haut risque qui les conduira vers le savoir.

programme.title: Vidas Bienestar Con Estilo
programme.desc: La serie presenta historias inspiradoras de personas que han hecho del bienestar una forma de vida. A traves de deportistas, aventureros y protagonistas del mundo saludable, cada episodio revela experiencias de superacion, conexion con la naturaleza y estilos de vida que promueven equilibrio, salud y armona.

programme.title: Der Stoff, aus dem Träume sind
programme.desc: What inspires people to take the initiative and organize communal living for themselves? What ideals drive them and how does the financing work? On the basis of six self-managed residential buildings in Austria from 40 years, this documentary sets out to find answers.

programme.title: Lost in the Living
programme.desc: Buzzing with lust for adventure, a musician from Dublin and his band move to Berlin. Oisin leaves behind the weight of losing his mother, and anger towards his absent father. Oisin meets Sabine, a pretty Berliner who shows him the city's secret places: cool parks, deserted subway stations, skinny dipping lakes in the countryside.

programme.title: Eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste et Eglise Terra Sancta, Israel
programme.desc: L’eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste a Ein Kerem est une eglise franciscaine du XIXe siecle, construite sur les ruines byzantines et croisees anterieures, marquant le lieu traditionnel de naissance de Jean-Baptiste.

programme.title: Como Aman los Hombres
programme.desc: Como aman los hombres es una serie de televisión surcoreana. Cuenta la historia de cuatro hombres en sus cuarenta años que han sido amigos desde que tenían dieciocho años, a medida que avanzan a través del amor, la ruptura, el éxito y el fracaso.

programme.title: Tel Afek (Fort Antipatris), Israel
programme.desc: Antipatris est un site archeologique riche situe sur la cote mediterraneenne israelienne. La ville fortifiee de Tel Afek, a mi-chemin entre Jerusalem et Cesaree, se trouve aujourd’hui dans un parc calme et silencieux. Le site est proche des sources perennes de la riviere Yarkon et fait desormais partie du parc national de Yarkon en Israel. Plus de 6 000 ans de villes successives se sont construites sur la colline surplombant les sources de la riviere Yarkon.

programme.title: Encuentros Que Generan Bienestar
programme.desc: Encuentros y conversaciones con personas, proyectos y experiencias que promueven el bienestar y una vida mas consciente. A traves de historias vinculadas al deporte, la naturaleza, la salud y el desarrollo personal, cada episodio invita a descubrir nuevas formas de vivir con equilibrio.

programme.title: Eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste et Eglise Terra Sancta, Israel
programme.desc: L’eglise Saint Jean-Baptiste a Ein Kerem est une eglise franciscaine du XIXe siecle, construite sur les ruines byzantines et croisees anterieures, marquant le lieu traditionnel de naissance de Jean-Baptiste.

programme.title: Eye Candy
programme.desc: Yasmin Lander from Norwich has wanted one thing above all else since she was a child: to become a female wrestler. She has been training for many years, making her debut in 2011. But the pink-clad upper-class girl she is supposed to embody doesn't suit her. She takes time off and creates a new alter ego: tomboy Charlie Morgan - tough, direct, self-confident.

programme.title: Mann im Spagat- Pace, Cowboy, Pace
programme.desc: Cowboy has a vision. He wants to save the planet with his Free Swingers, so he applies for a grant at The Central Agency. They send a representative named Fey of Sweden to approve Cowboy's proposal. She demands results and he decides to stage a charity bicycle rally featuring a roster of Berlin misfits on two wheels.

programme.title: Tiempo para saber
programme.desc: Gabriela Garcia Elizalde conocida como Gaby nos introduce en el fascinante mundo de la astrologia , la luna y el sol, la iportancia de los astros en nuestra carta natal, los asendientes y descientes y mucho mas de este fascinante mundo astrologico

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole de Francklyn et Olivier - Madagascar
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. Ils ont compris que seule l’instruction leur permettra d’ameliorer leur vie, et c’est pour cela que chaque jour, dans des paysages incroyables, ils se lancent dans un periple a haut risque qui les conduira vers le savoir.

programme.title: Not in my Backyard
programme.desc: Elliott and Teofilo, two released sex offenders in Miami, Florida are not allowed to leave their residence and must stay 750 yards away from schools, parks or other places where children regularly hang out. These requirements make it nearly impossible to find a job or housing. The consequences are homelessness and social isolation. "Bittner's film is worth watching for two reasons.

programme.title: Como Aman los Hombres
programme.desc: Como aman los hombres es una serie de televisión surcoreana. Cuenta la historia de cuatro hombres en sus cuarenta años que han sido amigos desde que tenían dieciocho años, a medida que avanzan a través del amor, la ruptura, el éxito y el fracaso.

programme.title: Eglise Saint Lazare, Israel
programme.desc: Plusieurs terrains ont ete acquis par la Custodie franciscaine de Terre Sainte, y compris ce terrain en 1863 pres du tombeau de Lazare. Entre 1952 et 1955, sur les ruines anciennes de plusieurs eglises, une eglise moderne dediee a Saint Lazare a ete construite. En effet, le tombeau de Lazare se trouve a proximite de l’eglise.

programme.title: Alimentacion Saludable
programme.desc: Un recorrido por proyectos, productores y especialistas que promueven una alimentacion saludable y consciente. Cada episodio descubre alimentos naturales, iniciativas agroecologicas y propuestas culinarias que combinan salud, sustentabilidad y bienestar en la vida cotidiana.

Elena is a student in Minsk making illegal deals in the Chernobyl death zone to save her father from going to prison. She is in an intense but increasingly destructive love affair with Viktor. When her father is arrested for illegal metal trading and tax evasion, in order to continue his business, she has to keep traveling to the Chernobyl restricted zone.

programme.title: Beit She'arim, Israel (Partie 2)
programme.desc: Beit She’arim, 2 episodes sur une ville greco-romaine, celebre site archeologique remarquable pour sa necropole. Vous decouvrirez une serie de catacombes, tunnels et cavernes.

programme.title: Tiempo para saber
programme.desc: Gabriela Garcia Elizalde conocida como Gaby nos introduce en el fascinante mundo de la astrologia , la luna y el sol, la iportancia de los astros en nuestra carta natal, los asendientes y descientes y mucho mas de este fascinante mundo astrologico

programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole d'Erbol - Kirghizie
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. programme.title: Homeopathy Unrefuted?
programme.desc: After investing 30 million euros in homeopathy research, pressure is mounting for proof that homeopathic remedies are more than placebos in treating at least one medical condition. Filmmaker Erik Lemke asks 19 representatives of the homeopathic mainstream - most of whom have a medical education - the same questions, and skillfully intercuts their contradictory answers.

programme.title: Les Chemins De L'ecole
programme.sub-title: Le chemin de l'ecole de YU Qiang - Chine
programme.desc: Ces enfants vivent aux quatre coins du globe mais partagent la meme soif d’apprendre. Ils ont compris que seule l’instruction leur permettra d’ameliorer leur vie, et c’est pour cela que chaque jour, dans des paysages incroyables, ils se lancent dans un periple a haut risque qui les conduira vers le savoir.

programme.title: Tiempo para nuestro cuerpo y mente
programme.desc: Lorena Roman nos introduce en el bow spring con una clase magistral para princiantes

programme.title: 9 Lives
programme.desc: 9 LIVES portrays the fate of young people who decided at the age of 11, 12 or 13 to leave home and to live on the streets. Any of these young people could have lived nine lives by now and they have been battered, both mentally and physically. But despite this, they have an enormous ability to find their own strengths, gifts and talents.

programme.title: Abbaye benedictine d’Abu Gosh, Israel
programme.desc: Situe pres de Jerusalem, dans le village d’Abu Gosh, ce monastere benedictin est l’un des plus beaux vestiges des Croises et l’un des mieux conserves en Israel. Il s’agit d’une eglise gothique construite par les Hospitaliers en 1140. En 1889, le gouvernement français acquiert ce magnifique monastere et le site passe sous la supervision des peres benedictins français.

programme.title: Beyhadh
programme.desc: Maya es una joven magnate de los negocios que ha triunfado en el mundo corporativo. Ella se enamora perdidamente de Arjun, un apuesto galán que ama la fotografía. En la misma empresa trabaja Saanjh, una bella joven enamoradiza.

programme.title: Ein Kerem, la Revelation chretienne, Israel (Partie 1)
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, lieu de naissance de Saint Jean-Baptiste et de la visite de Marie, est egalement un site touristique chic et pittoresque

programme.title: Amor Musical
programme.desc: Todo inicia cuando son transferidos a la escuela Jung San que recibe auspicio por parte de una fundación millonaria y poderosa. Como es de esperarse, los días escolares en esta escuela se convierte en una lucha sin fin. Cada día enfrentan el gran abismo entre el rico y el pobre. Ante la cruda realidad, en lo único que pueden confiar es en su música. Tocar con sus amigos es la única cosa que los mantiene vivos, al mismo tiempo, Su música los hace brillar por encima de los demás. “Amor Musical” es un drama musical como nunca antes visto; al mejor estilo y creado para el sentimiento punk.

programme.title: Evil in the Woods
programme.desc: A group of three young people go into the forest, having heard that there is a stone altar, they search until late at night and suddenly a young woman disappears from the group. The two men stay in the forest but can't find her. Initially, Malte Wirtz had wanted to shoot a romantic comedy in Cologne's Königsforst.

programme.title: Basilique de Jesus l’Adolescent, Israel
programme.desc: La basilique de Jesus l’Adolescent, egalement appelee simplement eglise salesienne, est une eglise catholique a Nazareth en Israel, appartenant aux Salesiens de Don Bosco. Situee a cote de l’ecole des Salesiens, elle a ete construite entre 1906 et 1923 sur une colline appelee Mont du Debut, qui surplombe la ville, où, selon la tradition, Jesus a passe sa jeunesse. De la terrasse de l’eglise, la vue sur la vieille ville de Nazareth est exceptionnelle, divisee en quartiers orthodoxe, catholique romain et musulman.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Huellas un hombre que camina- un viaje , una expedicion de 100 dias a la antartida

programme.title: Ein Kerem, la Revelation chretienne, Israel (Partie 2)
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, lieu de naissance de Saint Jean-Baptiste et de la visite de Marie, est egalement un site touristique chic et pittoresque.

programme.title: Marseille
programme.desc: Sophie flees to Marseille. She roams the streets alone, taking photographs. As she abandons herself to the city, she finds it impossible to reconcile her previous life with the now... Slowly, characters emerge and weave themselves into the story - then a cut follows - and Sophie is back in Berlin.

programme.title: Armonia Vintage
programme.desc: Huellas un hombre que camina- un viaje , una expedicion de 100 dias a la antartida

programme.title: The Gulls
programme.desc: The mild-mannered Elza, played by fashion model Evgeniya Mandzhieva in her debut role, lives a modest life as a housewife and part-time piano teacher. Her husband is a boorish and uncommunicative man who is involved in some shady business deals.

programme.title: Amor Musical
programme.desc: Todo inicia cuando son transferidos a la escuela Jung San que recibe auspicio por parte de una fundación millonaria y poderosa. programme.title: Afternoon
programme.desc: Konstantin is an unsuccessful writer, his mother is a narcissistic actress, his uncle is dying and shows no interest in his surroundings. The web of relationships between them, marked by speechlessness and inspired by Chekhov's "The Seagull," gradually unravels until blood ultimately flows.

programme.title: Angels of Revolution
programme.desc: Set in 1934, the film is inspired by the real events of the Kazym Uprising. The natives - Khanty and Nenets - reject the new ideology, preferring to believe in their gods and goddesses. Polina's art troupe, consisting of a composer, a filmmaker, a theater director, an architect and a sculptor, travels north to penetrate the illiterate minds of the isolated taiga.

programme.title: Amor Musical
programme.desc: Todo inicia cuando son transferidos a la escuela Jung San que recibe auspicio por parte de una fundación millonaria y poderosa. Como es de esperarse, los días escolares en esta escuela se convierte en una lucha sin fin. Cada día enfrentan el gran abismo entre el rico y el pobre. programme.title: MansFeld
programme.desc: Tom, Sebastian and Paul are children from very different families. They live in a small village in Mansfelder Land, an area marked by the decline of mining. However, an archaic custom has remained over the centuries and the three boys play a crucial role in it.

programme.title: Heiko's World
programme.desc: Heiko's mother Belinda suffers from keratoconus, a rare eye disease. She could soon go completely blind. Belinda's eyesight could be saved with an expensive operation - but the insurance company won't cover it.

programme.title: Como Aman los Hombres
programme.desc: Como aman los hombres es una serie de televisión surcoreana. Cuenta la historia de cuatro hombres en sus cuarenta años que han sido amigos desde que tenían dieciocho años, a medida que avanzan a través del amor, la ruptura, el éxito y el fracaso.

He would like to undo everything, but what would that mean? Who would he never have met? What conversations would he never have had? He looks back and realizes that life always means pain. But also joy... Against the dramaturgical grain, Chris Brügge tells the story of a young man and his encounters with important people in his life.

programme.title: Como Aman los Hombres
programme.desc: Como aman los hombres es una serie de televisión surcoreana. Cuenta la historia de cuatro hombres en sus cuarenta años que han sido amigos desde que tenían dieciocho años, a medida que avanzan a través del amor, la ruptura, el éxito y el fracaso.

programme.title: Gender Crisis
programme.desc: Samson is blessed with magical hair that gives him inhuman strength and hypnotically attracts women and men. The cunning femme fatale De seizes his mane and thereby acquires seductive powers herself. However, De's happiness is also short-lived and her new powers arouse desire. Lilah, too, has her sights set on the magical mane.

programme.title: In Your Arms
programme.desc: After a failed suicide attempt the terminally ill Niels, accompanied by nurse Maria, embarks on a poignant journey to seek assisted suicide in Switzerland. Because Maria prevented the suicide attempt of Niels, who suffers from a degenerative disease and is unbearably difficult to live with, she feels responsible for him. Director Samanou A.

programme.title: Amor Musical
programme.desc: Todo inicia cuando son transferidos a la escuela Jung San que recibe auspicio por parte de una fundación millonaria y poderosa. Como es de esperarse, los días escolares en esta escuela se convierte en una lucha sin fin. Cada día enfrentan el gran abismo entre el rico y el pobre. programme.title: Motorcity
programme.desc: MOTORCITY focuses on the local amateur drag racing scene in Detroit, Michigan, but goes beyond just the sport. The film follows John Quick, Carter & Son Racing, and Karri Anne Beebe over two years as they strive to shave tenths of seconds off their race times.

programme.title: Como Aman los Hombres
programme.desc: Como aman los hombres es una serie de televisión surcoreana. Cuenta la historia de cuatro hombres en sus cuarenta años que han sido amigos desde que tenían dieciocho años, a medida que avanzan a través del amor, la ruptura, el éxito y el fracaso.

programme.title: Name Me
programme.desc: In sun-bathed Crimea before the Russian invasion, 17-year-old Olya, accompanied by her easygoing friend, Sasha, musters the courage to meet her biological father for the first time. Right before they meet Olya's father, the two decide to switch roles. At first, the whole situation seems to work out well, but soon Sergey, Olya's father, becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Como Aman los Hombres
programme.desc: Como aman los hombres es una serie de televisión surcoreana. Cuenta la historia de cuatro hombres en sus cuarenta años que han sido amigos desde que tenían dieciocho años, a medida que avanzan a través del amor, la ruptura, el éxito y el fracaso.

programme.title: Stories from the Sea
programme.desc: The film shows these women as they navigate the sea, calculate routes and perform tasks such as hoisting the sails and steering the ship. The documentary features women of different ages and backgrounds, including an apprentice on a cargo ship, a retiree traveling alone on a cruise ship, and a group of young people on a sailing trip for intercultural understanding.

programme.title: The Postman's White Nights
programme.desc: Gentle vignettes from a remote northern Russian village on the shores of Lake Kenozero tell the story of its postman, who is the village's only lifeline to the outside world. In the shadow of the nearby spaceport, the villagers live off their pensions and become addicted to vodka under the yoke of the mayoress.

programme.title: Como Aman los Hombres
programme.desc: Como aman los hombres es una serie de televisión surcoreana. Cuenta la historia de cuatro hombres en sus cuarenta años que han sido amigos desde que tenían dieciocho años, a medida que avanzan a través del amor, la ruptura, el éxito y el fracaso.

programme.title: Johanna Dohnal - Visionary of Feminism
programme.desc: Dohnal worked in the SPÖ from 1956 and was a minister from 1979 to 1995. Under her leadership, rape within marriage became punishable, guardianship of unmarried mothers was abolished, sexual harassment became a criminal offense, and expulsion in cases of domestic violence became law. Women's shelters, gender quotas, and equal treatment laws were established for the first time.

programme.title: 15Th Meridian East - Similarity In Difference
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains.

programme.title: 15Th Meridian East - Similarity In Difference
programme.desc: What ideas are developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in?

programme.title: Iceland - On Top Of The World
programme.desc: Iceland - a unique land with an incomparable landscape and pleasantly euphoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Gronland - In The Glare Of Ice
programme.desc: 80% of Greenland is covered by Ice and most of the inhabitants are spread over the ice-free west coast.

programme.title: Maretv: In Alaska's Fjord World
programme.desc: Gigantic fjords and over 5,000 small islands: In Alaska there's a lot of wilderness and little civilization.

programme.title: Aurora - Fire In The Sky
programme.desc: In the earth’s polar regions, a ghostly flicker and colourful glow often brighten the night sky.

programme.title: Project Antarctica
programme.desc: Tim, Michael and Dennis set off on the 14,000 km journey to Antarctica. And thus on the journey of a lifetime.

programme.title: Penguin City - South Georgia
programme.desc: In the middle of the Antarctic Ocean, an entire mountain range arises from the water: South Georgia.

programme.title: Symphony Of The Seas - Underwater Wonders Of Australia's Ocean
programme.desc: Our journey takes us to Australia and leads us to the most fascinating places, landscapes and animals.

programme.title: The Last Paradises: Patagonia - Coast Of The Killer Whale
programme.desc: The trip to the hot spots for animal watchers and researchers leads us inter alia to the Caleta Valdez.

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: This is the story of how hummingbirds became the ultimate creatures of the air.

programme.title: Maretv: Santorini - The Beauty On The Powder Keg
programme.desc: The Santorini archipelago is a gem, but is located on a veritable powder keg.

programme.title: Maretv: Venice - Lagoon And Legend
programme.desc: Venice has been attracting people as if by magic for centuries. The Italians call her La Serenissima.

programme.title: Maretv: Capri And The Amalfi Coast - Italy's Ocean Legends
programme.desc: Capri was already in ancient times a place for the rich and beautiful – and is still one of the most famous.

programme.title: Maretv: The Blue And White Island World Of Greece: Mykonos, Naxos And Tinos
programme.desc: Around the once sacred Isle of Delos, some 200 islands, including 20 larger ones, are arranged in a circle.

programme.title: The Turkish Riviera - The Flair Of Antiquity And A Turquoise Sea
programme.desc: A coast with miles of bathing beaches, turquoise-blue water, breathtaking cliffs and a lot of history.

programme.title: Maretv: Sardinia - Magical Island In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Sardinia is the second-largest island in the Mediterranean. The Sardin-ians say it's a "continent for itself".

programme.title: The Marvellous World Of French Rivers
programme.desc: The Gironde, Europe's largest tidal current, creates a unique microclimate and diverse ecosystem.

programme.title: The Marvellous World Of French Rivers
programme.desc: The Dordogne: A perfect management of a precious resource invented by the complex nature itself.

programme.title: The Most Spectacular Change Of Seasons - Spring
programme.desc: This film explores spring in Central Europe and presents nature from a perspective you have never seen before.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.sub-title: Wild Baltic - Life On The Amber Coast
programme.desc: The film presents the Curonian Spit, the beaches of the Latvian Baltic Sea and the island worlds of Estonia.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.sub-title: Wild Baltic - Enchanted Forests And Moors
programme.desc: The wide wilderness of the Baltics is home to many animals - from bears and wolves to eagles and storcks

programme.title: Chiemgau, A Changing Landscape
programme.desc: In the Caribbean, volcanoes rise steeply from the sea, thus shaping the sister islands of St. Kitts & Nevis.

programme.title: Chiemgau, A Changing Landscape
programme.desc: Three floods in two decades altered Chiemsee's climate, wildlife, and landscapes, impacting farmland species.

programme.title: Bavarian Forest - Deep, Dark And Enchanted
programme.desc: The film shows how powerfully and relentlessly the wildness has returned to the national park.

programme.title: Germany's Wild Amazon
programme.desc: The Wupper - a popular river in Germany and one of the greatest anomalies of all time.

programme.title: Germany's Wild Amazon
programme.desc: The Wupper - a popular river in Germany and one of the greatest anomalies of all time.

programme.title: Germany's Wild Reservoirs
programme.desc: In North Rhine-Westphalia's Bergisches Land, dams built over 130 years ago for special flood protection.

programme.title: Germany's Wild Reservoirs
programme.desc: In North Rhine-Westphalia's Bergisches Land, dams built over 130 years ago for special flood protection.

programme.title: Germany's Mystic Forest
programme.desc: Dark green, impenetrable forests cover a landscape with secluded valleys and rugged mountain ridges.

programme.title: Wilderness In Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.sub-title: The Psychogramm Of A Spiritual Landscape
programme.desc: The Bohemian Forest is the source of the Vltava River, home to primeval forests and untouched high moors.

programme.title: Wilderness In Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: Many share a vision of a primeval forest that can grow for future generations in which man does not interfere.

programme.title: Mantises - Masters Of Deception
programme.desc: They fight Kung Fu style and are seen in Japan as a symbol of vigilance - the mantises.

programme.title: Red Panda - World's Cutest Animal
programme.desc: The Red Panda is undoubtedly one of the most beautiful animals on earth.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow 3 young bears of different species – polar bears, brown bears, sloth bears – in varied landscapes.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: As an animal filmmaker, one often deals with lots of strange old birds.

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt
programme.desc: Watch the Final showdown between predator and prey: will the hunt succeed or will the hoofed animals prevail?

programme.title: The Last Paradises: Breath Of The Arctic - Wilderness North
programme.desc: This foray above the polar circle takes us to a part of planet especially affected by climate change.

programme.title: Spectacular Wildlife In The Forests Around The Globe
programme.desc: A forest is like an organism, ancient and full of complex mechanics at work. (Part 1/3)

programme.title: One Year In Norway's Lofoten
programme.sub-title: One Year In Norway's Lofoten: Episode 1
programme.desc: Lofoten's winter cod season harvests over 65,000 tons, securing the region's economy.

programme.title: One Year In Norway's Lofoten
programme.sub-title: One Year In Norway's Lofoten: Episode 2
programme.desc: Unstad, with 15 residents, hosts Lofoten's northernmost surf center, attracting global surfers.

programme.title: Faroe Islands - A Secret Beauty
programme.desc: Descendants of Vikings, the Faroese cherish traditions while embracing modernity.

programme.title: Fair Trade - Cocoa From Ivory Coast (On The Road With Hannes Jaenicke)
programme.desc: Do we as consumers hold the power to change consume for the better?

programme.title: Over The Islands Of Africa
programme.sub-title: Over The Islands Of Africa, Zanzibar
programme.desc: Photographer Matthias Ziegler comes to Zanzibar with ultralight pilot who flies him around on this adventure!

programme.title: Over The Islands Of Africa
programme.sub-title: Over The Islands Of Africa, Mauritius
programme.desc: Photographer and paramotor pilot Renaud Van Der Meeren is doing an adventurous photo book about Mauritius.

programme.title: Over The Islands Of Africa
programme.sub-title: Over The Islands Of Africa, Madagascar
programme.desc: Madagascar treats Ami to a multitude of new impressions and spectacular pictures. We accompany her on her trip

programme.title: Over The Islands Of Africa
programme.sub-title: Over The Islands Of Africa, Sao Tome And Principe
programme.desc: Along with photographer Rui Camilo, we travel to the West African island nation of Sao Tomé and Príncipe.

programme.title: Over The Islands Of Africa
programme.sub-title: Over The Islands Of Africa, Cape Verde
programme.desc: We accompany Stéphane and Richard on their adventureous journey to Cape Verde full of unforgettable encounter.

programme.title: Wild Slovakia
programme.desc: The film “Wild Slovakia” stops at all the top wildlife spots and habitats of this fairly small country.

programme.title: Montenegro - From The Black Mountains To The Beach
programme.desc: The Balkan land of Montenegro owes its name to the Black Mountains. But there is so much more to discover...

programme.title: North Macedonia: Between Traditional Dances And Mini Navy
programme.desc: Northern Macedonia emerged from being a once constituent republic of the former Yugoslavia.

programme.title: Fertile Floods - Croatia's Wetlands
programme.desc: Every year, in the middle of Croatia, it's the same story: after the annual snowmelt, a huge flood wave spills

programme.title: The Green Heart Of Croatia - At The Banks Of River Sava
programme.desc: Alongside the Sava lies a natural paradise, unique in Central Europe.

programme.title: Bosnia Herzegovina
programme.desc: Wild and unknown lies the still undiscovered natural paradise of Bosnia and Herzegovina in the heart of Europe

programme.title: Bosnia Herzegovina
programme.desc: It is the largest wetland in the country, and also the largest regularly flooded karst field in the world.
